Built over one hackathon weekend on consumer hardware (GTX 1650 Ti Max-Q, plus Colab T4 for SAE training), this preliminary evidence suggests activation-level auditing may surface failure modes invisible to behavioral evaluation, with substantial variation across architectures.

</details>


### [449] [Modularizing Educational LLM-Agency for Fostering Responsible Learning Assistance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30187)
*Julius Gabelmann,Felix Jahn,Kevin Baum,Sophie van Rossum,Emely Wuenscher,Timo P. Gros,Verena Wolf*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种模块化的代理式AI聊天机器人架构，旨在通过融入教育学原理，负责任地支持学生解题学习，避免通用大语言模型在教育中可能带来的负面效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型虽可访问教育科学知识，但缺乏对教学法原则的遵循，可能导致学生迁移能力、批判性思维和创造力下降，因此需要更负责任的AI教育应用方案。

Method: 基于负责任LLM教育系统应满足的若干理想特性，指出单体式现成方案的结构性缺陷，提出一种模块化代理架构，并为解题各阶段设计特定功能模块以嵌入针对性教学指导。

Result: 构建了一个可控制、透明且可监督的模块化代理AI聊天机器人架构，支持学生在解题过程中获得符合教育学原理的引导。

Conclusion: 模块化代理架构是实现负责任AI教育部署的有效路径，能更好融合教学法知识，提升学习效果与过程可控性。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of AI chatbots in education will drastically change learning, making responsible deployment a critical concern. While large language models (LLMs) might have access to sources discussing insights from educational sciences, they are not particularly inclined to adhere to pedagogical concepts, risking negative effects on the learning process, such as a loss of transfer capabilities, critical thinking, or creativity. In this paper, we introduce an agentic AI chatbot architecture assisting students with exercise solving, specifically designed to contribute to more responsible AI use in education. We base our conceptual development on the identification of several desiderata for responsible LLM-based educational systems, argue for the structural shortcomings inherent in monolithic, out-of-the-box solutions, and instead suggest modularizing the agentic architecture. We propose specific modules for different stages of exercise solving, enabling incorporation of targeted pedagogical advice, guiding students through the learning process in a more controllable, transparent, and overseeable manner.

</details>


### [450] [Double-Edged Sword or Sharp Tool? Designing and Evaluating Triadic LLM-Teacher Collaboration for K-12 Writing at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30200)
*Canran Wang,Yuwen Yang,Zhen Wang,Ming Ma,Ding Yu,Chentai Wang,Keman Huang,Xiaoyong Du*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向K-12写作教学的LLM-教师-学生三方协作系统，基于系统功能语言学构建多维评估框架，并通过大规模实证数据（57,954篇作文）验证其有效性，发现LLM与教师需动态适配协作强度以避免边际效用递减。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在教育中具有双刃剑效应，亟需建立LLM、教师与学生之间有效的三方协作机制，尤其在K-12写作教学中。

Method: 构建基于系统功能语言学的多维评估框架和建议轨迹追踪流程，开发三方协作系统，并分析两年内来自120所学校的10,195名学生的57,954篇作文数据。

Result: 证实该系统能提升写作质量；LLM作为生成引擎缓解教师负担，教师作为教学把关者保障反馈质量；发现过度语言扩展存在天花板效应，提示需随学生能力提升动态调整LLM-教师协作强度。

Conclusion: LLM与教师在K-12写作教学中角色互补且均不可或缺，但协作方式应随学生水平变化而自适应调整，以突破效能瓶颈。

Abstract: The double-edged sword of integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) requires an effective triadic collaboration mechanism among LLMs, teachers and students, especially for K-12 education. By developing a triadic collaboration system to support K-12 writing learning, a multidimensional evaluation framework grounded in Systemic Functional Linguistics and the suggestion trajectory tracing pipeline, this paper contributes a large-scale empirical dataset involving $57,954$ essays from $10,195$ students across $120$ schools over two years. Our findings confirm the efficacy of this system in improving writing quality through a strategic labor division: the LLM serves as a generative engine to mitigate teacher burnout, and the teacher acts as a pedagogical gatekeeper and bridge to guarantee feedback quality. While both LLM and teacher are critical for skill improvement, we uncover a ceiling effect where excessive linguistic expansion yields diminishing marginal utility. These suggest a dynamically adaptive LLM-teacher collaboration as student proficiency increases.

</details>


### [451] [Persona Conditioning of Brand Recommendations in Retrieval-Augmented Commercial Chat: A Prominence-Stratified Cross-Provider Audit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30207)
*Will Jack,Noah Lehman,Keller Maloney,Sarah Xu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模审计发现，AI助手对同一查询词（如“最佳CRM软件”）的推荐结果会因用户画像（persona）不同而显著变化，尤其影响中端市场品牌；这种效应在依赖训练先验和上下文整合更强的模型（如Anthropic Sonnet）中更明显，提示品牌感知测量必须以用户画像为条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 同一搜索词在不同用户背景下（如创始人、企业VP、英国中小企主）可能隐含不同需求，但现有AI推荐系统是否据此调整品牌推荐尚不明确，需系统性审计其 persona 敏感性。

Method: 设计包含10类用户画像×8个提示词×3种模型配置×每组10次重复的大规模审计实验（共2000次运行），采用Jaccard相似度量化推荐集变化，并结合检索证据分析生成路径差异。

Result: 添加persona前缀使推荐集相似度下降0.12–0.20；头部品牌推荐稳定（~80%一致性），中端品牌变动高达75%；Anthropic模型的persona效应点估计大于OpenAI，且其43–52%推荐缺乏可追溯检索依据，而OpenAI仅为8–29%。

Conclusion: AI品牌推荐具有强persona依赖性，尤其在中端市场和高先验依赖型模型中；因此，任何AI品牌感知测量都必须以用户画像为条件，否则将掩盖关键变异性。

Abstract: The same prompt -- "best CRM software" -- reaches AI assistants from buyers in widely different contexts: a solo founder, an enterprise VP, a UK SMB owner. We audit how strongly that contextual variation reshapes which brands the model recommends. The audit samples 2,000 runs over a design space of 10 personas x 8 prompts x 3 model configurations x N=10 reps, with the two OpenAI cells at full 8-prompt coverage and the Anthropic sonnet-4.6 / low cell at 4-prompt coverage. Prefixing the user message with a persona drops the recommendation-set similarity (Jaccard) by Delta = -0.12 to -0.20 relative to a same-persona baseline (clustered 95% CIs exclude zero on all three measured cells; the sonnet cell's CI rests on only 4 prompt clusters and is correspondingly wider). The effect is sharply prominence-stratified: category leaders are persona-resistant (~80% same-brand consistency across personas), but mid-market brands swap up to 75% of the recommendation set as the persona changes. The Anthropic model shows a larger point-estimate effect than the OpenAI configurations, though clustered CIs overlap for the closer contrast (sonnet vs. OpenAI/high); the asymmetry is consistent with Anthropic's more retrieval-unattributed generation route (43-52% recommendations without observed retrieval-layer evidence, vs OpenAI's 8-29%, documented in Jack 2026). Any measurement of AI brand perception must condition on the buyer persona supplying the query: the same prompt produces materially different recommendation sets depending on who the model thinks is asking, and a measurement protocol that aggregates across personas systematically obscures that variation. The effect concentrates at mid-market and is largest on the most priors-reliant generation route in our audit, consistent with persona responsiveness growing as models lean more on training-data priors and richer context integration.

</details>


### [452] [When Should Models Change Their Minds? Contextual Belief Management in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30219)
*Haoming Xu,Weihong Xu,Zongrui Li,Mengru Wang,Yunzhi Yao,Chiyu Wu,Jin Shang,Yu Gong,Shumin Deng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出上下文信念管理（CBM）问题，设计了可量化的BeliefTrack基准来评估语言模型在长程交互中维持、更新与隔离信念状态的能力，并通过强化学习和表征干预显著降低失败率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时序交互中语言模型需有效管理不断累积的信息（如何时更新/保持/忽略状态），但现有模型在此类上下文信念管理（CBM）任务上缺乏系统评估与改进方法。

Method: 提出CBM形式化定义；构建封闭世界基准BeliefTrack（含规则发现与电路诊断），支持逐轮精确评估；采用显式信念提示、强化学习（以信念状态为奖励）及表征级引导等方法进行干预与分析。

Result:  vanilla LLM在BeliefTrack上表现严重不足；显式提示提升有限；强化学习使平均失败率下降70.9%；表征级引导在两项任务上平均降低失败率46.1%；揭示了潜在信念状态动态机制。

Conclusion: CBM是语言模型长程推理的关键瓶颈；结构化监督（如信念奖励）和内部表征调控比单纯提示更有效；BeliefTrack为未来研究提供了可复现、可分解的评估框架。

Abstract: Long-horizon interactions require language models to manage accumulating information: when to update their state, when to preserve their state, and what to ignore. We study this challenge as \textbf{Contextual Belief Management (CBM)}: maintaining a predicted belief state aligned with formal evidence while isolating task-irrelevant noise. To make CBM measurable, we introduce BeliefTrack, a closed-world benchmark spanning Rule Discovery and Circuit Diagnosis, where a finite belief space and symbolic verifiers enable exact turn-level evaluation. BeliefTrack diagnoses three failures: Failed Stay, Failed Update, and Failed Isolation. Across multiple LLMs, vanilla models exhibit severe CBM failures, while explicit belief-tracking prompts provide limited gains. In contrast, reinforcement learning with belief-state rewards reduces failure rates by 70.9\% on average. Further probing reveals latent belief-state dynamics behind these failures, and representation-level steering reduces failure rates by 46.1\% across two tasks\footnote{Code is coming soon at https://github.com/zjunlp/CBM.

</details>


### [453] [mcp-proto-okn: Natural-language access to open scientific knowledge graphs through the Model Context Protocol](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30283)
*Peter W. Rose,Benjamin M. Good,Amanda M. Saravia-Butler,Charlotte A. Nelson,James P. Balhoff,Yaphet Kebede,Patricia L. Whetzel,Christopher Bizon,Andrew I. Su,Sergio E. Baranzini*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: mcp-proto-okn 是一个基于 Python 的 Model Context Protocol 服务器，支持 AI 助手通过自然语言发现、检查、查询和集成科学知识图谱，降低跨领域知识图谱分析门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 降低生物医学与科学用户跨领域知识图谱分析的技术门槛，提升科学知识图谱的可访问性与可用性。

Method: 基于 Python 和 FastMCP 框架实现，提供图路由、模式检查、SPARQL 执行、本体扩展、多图查询及转录生成等功能。

Result: 开发并开源了 mcp-proto-okn 服务器，支持自然语言驱动的知识图谱交互，具备完整文档、客户端配置说明与示例分析转录。

Conclusion: mcp-proto-okn 为科学AI助手提供了标准化、易集成的知识图谱交互能力，推动科学知识计算的普及化与实用化。

Abstract: MCP Server Proto-OKN (mcp-proto-okn) is a Python-based Model Context Protocol server that enables AI assistants to discover, inspect, query and integrate scientific knowledge graphs through natural language. The server provides graph routing, schema inspection, SPARQL execution, ontology expansion, multi-graph querying, and transcript generation, lowering the barrier to cross-domain knowledge graph analysis for biomedical and scientific users.
  mcp-proto-okn is implemented in Python using the FastMCP framework and is available at https://github.com/sbl-sdsc/mcp-proto-okn. Documentation, client configuration instructions, and example analysis transcripts are provided in the GitHub repository.

</details>


### [454] [ProjectionBench: Evaluating Scientific Hypothesis Generation in LLMs Under Progressive Information Disclosure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30284)
*A. J. Lew,Y. Cao,M. J. Buehler*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种评估大语言模型（LLM）在科学发现与推理中创新能力的新基准框架，通过渐进式信息披露和原子级语义相似性比对，系统评测模型从假设生成到实证推理的能力，并在45篇材料科学论文上测试了GPT-5.4和Gemini 3.1 pro等模型的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准多聚焦多跳检索，缺乏对LLM在真实科学发现中所需创新性推理能力的评估。

Method: 构建渐进式基准框架：从研究主题和问题出发，逐步披露技术细节；每阶段要求模型生成假设，并通过原子级语义相似性与原文结论比对评估其创新性与推理准确性。

Result: GPT-5.4和Gemini 3.1 pro表现最优，其中GPT-5.4在极简上下文下仍保持0.7的F1分数，表明其具备较强初始假设生成能力。

Conclusion: 该框架可系统评估LLM从创新发想到严谨推理的全链条科学能力，为构建AI科学家/协作者系统奠定评估基础。

Abstract: Scientific discovery is an inherently creative and uncertain process, requiring reasoning beyond the recall of known knowledge. While many benchmarks have been proposed to evaluate large language model (LLM) performance on deep research tasks via multi-hop retrieval, their innovative reasoning abilities essential for true scientific discovery remain largely untested. We introduce a benchmark framework for evaluating model performance in scientific discovery and reasoning, building up from a raw problem to the classical null hypothesis test. In our framework, models initially receive only the topic and research question from a recent paper, with technical details progressively revealed. At each stage of information disclosure, the model is tasked with generating hypotheses that address the research question, which is compared with the conclusions from the original paper and evaluated via automated semantic similarity of constituent atomic claims. This progressive evaluation of semantic divergence from ground-truth conclusions enables assessment of a model's innovativeness (under minimal information) to grounded reasoning capabilities (under full experimental details), both critical for using LLMs for scientific discovery purposes. Our framework provides a foundation for systematically evaluating scientific reasoning and discovery capabilities in LLMs, crucial for advancing the development of next-generation AI scientist/co-scientist systems. Specifically, here we evaluate GPT-5, GPT-5.4, Gemini 2.5 pro, and Gemini 3.1 pro preview across 45 papers spanning bioactive materials, mechanical materials, and nanomaterials. We find that GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 pro outperform their previous generation counterparts as expected, and GPT-5.4 in particular maintains 0.7 F1 score alignment with ground truth conclusions even under minimal context.

</details>


### [455] [MIRA: Mid-training Rubric Anchoring for Source-Aware Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30288)
*Haowen Wang,Yaxin Du,Jian Yang,Jiajun Wu,Shukai Liu,Yuxuan Zhang,Pingjie Wang,Siheng Chen,Tuney Zheng,Ming Zhou,Xianglong Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出MIRA框架，通过自锚定标准发现实现源感知过滤，解决大语言模型中期训练阶段的数据选择问题，在代码相关任务中显著提升性能并减少一半token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 中期训练数据选择需兼顾可扩展性和源适应性语义标准，但现有方法在显式质量评估与可扩展性之间存在权衡。

Method: MIRA是一种源感知过滤框架，核心是将标准构建纳入数据选择过程：先为每组数据源发现应评估的内容，再将这些判断蒸馏为可扩展的学生评分器进行全语料库过滤。

Result: 在包含21个来源、5个源组的代码导向中期训练中，MIRA在九个代码基准测试中均优于基线方法，并以仅一半token用量达到与全语料训练相当的效果。

Conclusion: MIRA通过自锚定rubric发现实现了高效、源适配的数据筛选，为大规模异构数据下的中期训练提供了新范式。

Abstract: Mid-training has become an important stage in modern LLM development, using large-scale curated mixtures to strengthen capabilities before final post-training. Its data selection problem is distinct: the data are optimized under a pretraining-style objective at near-pretraining scale, but are curated toward downstream capabilities and drawn from heterogeneous sources with different formats and training roles. As a result, effective selection requires both scalability and source-adaptive semantic criteria. Existing model-based methods scale well, but provide only implicit quality signals. Semantic selection methods offer stronger judgments, but usually assume fixed rubrics or standardized data formats. To address this mismatch, we propose MIRA, a source-aware filtering framework based on self-anchored rubric discovery. The key idea is to make rubric construction part of data selection: MIRA first discovers what should be evaluated for each source group, then distills those judgments into scalable student scorers for full-corpus filtering. On code-oriented mid-training with 21 sources and 5 source groups, MIRA outperforms selection baselines across nine code benchmarks and matches the full-corpus run while using only half the tokens.

</details>


### [456] [Demystifying Data Organization for Enhanced LLM Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30334)
*Yalun Dai,Yangyu Huang,Tongshen Yang,Yonghan Wang,Xin Zhang,Wenshan Wu,Qihao Zhao,Hao Li,Yuanyuan Gao,Kim-Hui Yap,Scarlett Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了数据组织方式对大语言模型（LLM）训练效率的影响，提出四条优化准则（边界锐化、循环调度、课程连续性、局部多样性），并据此设计两种新数据排序方法STR和SAW，在多种规模模型与数据上验证其有效性与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM通常只训练一两个epoch，因此数据组织策略对训练效率影响显著，但该方向尚缺乏系统研究。

Method: 复用已有的样本级评分，提出四条数据组织准则，并基于此设计STR和SAW两种数据排序方法。

Result: 在不同模型规模和数据规模的预训练与监督微调阶段均验证了所提准则与方法的有效性和鲁棒性，提升了训练稳定性与模型性能。

Conclusion: 数据组织是提升LLM训练效率的重要且可行的途径；所提出的四条准则与STR/SAW方法具有普适性与低开销优势。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized various fields, yet their training efficiency is heavily reliant on effective data curation. While data selection has been widely studied, the strategic data organization for enhanced training remains an underexplored area, particularly since current LLMs are often trained for only one or a few epochs. This paper systematically explores the influence of data organization on LLM training by reusing pre-computed sample-level scores originally generated for data efficiency, thereby incurring minimal additional computational overhead. We identify and formalize four key guidelines for optimizing data organization: Boundary Sharpening, Cyclic Scheduling, Curriculum Continuity, and Local Diversity. Guided by them, we introduce two novel data ordering methods termed STR and SAW. Extensive experiments across different model scales and data sizes, encompassing both pre-training and SFT stages, validate the effectiveness of our summarized guidelines. They also demonstrate the robustness of our proposed data ordering methods in enhancing the stability and performance of LLM training. Github Link: https://github.com/microsoft/data-efficacy/

</details>


### [457] [Locally Coherent, Globally Incoherent: Bounding Compositional Incoherence in Multi-Component LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30335)
*Anany Kotawala*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究多组件大语言模型（LLM）代理在组合概率声明时出现的局部一致但全局不一致问题，提出可计算的‘组合残差’eps*来量化该不一致性，并设计投影修复与在线监控方法；实验表明该问题普遍且现有直观缓解策略效果不佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多组件LLM代理中，各组件仅基于局部信息生成概率声明，虽各自局部一致，但组合后可能违反基本概率公理，导致系统级不可靠，亟需形式化刻画与修复机制。

Method: 提出组合残差eps*（L2距离到联合一致多面体），建立乘积结构二分法理论，用Rayleigh商预测残差，设计Boyle-Dykstra层次投影进行确定性修复，并引入anytime-valid e-process实现序列式一致性监控。

Result: 在1876个四LLM集成团上，33–94%存在eps*>0；造成平均+0.115 nat/bet的决策后悔（在比例下注规则下）；三种LLM端直觉缓解策略（检索、分区感知提示、聚合LLM）均失败或恶化。

Conclusion: 局部一致性不能保证全局一致性，需显式组合层校准；eps*是实用的运行时诊断指标，所提投影与e-process方法可有效修复与监控，而单纯改进LLM提示或架构不足以解决该结构性缺陷。

Abstract: Multi-component LLM agents assemble probabilistic claims from components that each see only part of a joint problem; the composition can violate basic probability axioms even when every component is locally coherent. We formalise this locally coherent, globally incoherent failure via the compositional residual eps*, the L2 distance from the composed quote to the joint coherent polytope, computable at runtime from system output and the declared cross-component coupling constraints. A product-structure dichotomy characterises when local coherence suffices, and a Rayleigh-quotient prediction matches the observed residual within 7% on three of four relation classes. A hierarchical Boyle-Dykstra projection repairs the composition deterministically; an anytime-valid e-process gives sequential coherence monitoring. Across 1,876 ensemble cliques on a four-LLM mid-tier panel (frontier-panel rerun in Section 5.5), eps* > 0 on 33-94% of cliques, translating to +0.115 nats per bet of regret on 1,770 resolved bets under the proportional allocation rule (the gain collapses to +0.006 under bettors that themselves coherentise). Three intuitive LLM-side mitigations(retrieval, partition-aware prompting, aggregator-LLM) each fail or regress.

</details>


### [458] [Tiny but Trusted: Efficient Vision-Language Reasoning for Time-Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30344)
*Xiaona Zhou,Muntasir Wahed,Tianjiao Yu,Constantin Brif,Ismini Lourentzou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出VisAnomBench基准和VisAnomReasoner模型，通过多VLM协同生成高质量自然语言异常解释，实现可解释、高精度的时间序列异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）在时序异常检测任务中表现不佳，且公开基准缺乏自然语言解释，难以支持VLM的可解释性微调。

Method: 构建VisAnomBench基准：基于公开时序数据集，利用多个大VLM生成异常解释，并通过细粒度任务特定奖励筛选高质量解释；在此基础上，采用参数高效微调策略训练VisAnomReasoner。

Result: 在VisAnomBench上，VisAnomReasoner在精度和F1上分别提升至少21.23和23.87个百分点；在TSB-AD-U跨基准测试中，精度和F1分别提升9.57和13.39个百分点。

Conclusion: VisAnomBench填补了时序异常检测中自然语言解释基准的空白，VisAnomReasoner验证了结合高质量语言解释进行参数高效微调的有效性，显著提升了检测性能与可解释性。

Abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive performance across many tasks, yet prior studies report unsatisfactory performance when applying large language or multimodal models to finding abnormal patterns in sequential data. Public anomaly detection benchmarks typically provide interval annotations but not natural-language rationales, making it difficult to fine-tune VLMs to produce grounded, interpretable decisions. To address this gap, we construct VisAnomBench, a curated benchmark built from public time-series datasets and augmented with high-quality anomaly explanations selected from multiple large VLMs using fine-grained, task-specific rewards. Through fine-tuning on this benchmark, we develop VisAnomReasoner, a parameter-efficient VLM for time-series anomaly detection. Experimental results on VisAnomBench show that VisAnomReasoner achieves more accurate anomaly localization and consistently outperforms all baselines, with improvements of at least 21.23 and 23.87 percentage points in precision and F1, respectively. Additional experiments on the TSB-AD-U benchmark demonstrate strong cross-benchmark generalization, with VisAnomReasoner improving precision and F1 by 9.57 and 13.39 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [459] [SchGen: PCB Schematic Generation with Semantic-Grounded Code Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30345)
*Qinpei Luo,Ruichun Ma,Xinyu Zhang,Lili Qiu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了SchGen，首个能从自然语言请求生成可编辑PCB原理图的大型语言模型，通过设计语义化代码表示和构建大规模数据集，显著提升了连线准确性和功能正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PCB原理图设计目前仍依赖人工和专业知识，而基于自然语言意图的生成方法尚未被探索；现有原理图格式冗长、工具依赖性强、几何信息繁重，难以被大模型可靠生成。

Method: 提出一种语义驱动的代码表示法，将原理图编辑操作编码为相对位置和基于引脚名的布线；构建了通过人机协作流水线生成的大规模原理图-自然语言配对数据集。

Result: SchGen在连线连通性和功能正确性上显著优于其他表示方法及更大的通用大语言模型。

Conclusion: 表示方法的设计对推动大模型应用于复杂硬件设计任务至关重要。

Abstract: Printed circuit board (PCB) schematic design defines nearly all electronic hardware, but it remains manual and expertise-intensive. While generative AI has advanced digital and analog IC design, PCB schematic generation from natural-language intent is largely unexplored. This paper presents SchGen, the first large language model that generates editable PCB schematics from natural-language requests. The key challenge lies in the lack of an LLM-suited representation and a large-scale dataset. Current schematic formats are dominated by verbose, tool-specific syntax and geometry-heavy descriptions, making them difficult to generate reliably. We introduce a semantically grounded code representation that encodes schematic editing primitives with relative placement and pin-name-based wiring, transforming a geometry-driven generation problem into a semantics-driven matching task amenable to LLMs. We further construct a large-scale dataset of PCB schematics paired with user prompts via a human-agent collaborative pipeline that converts open-source hardware designs into our representation. Experiments show that SchGen significantly outperforms alternative representations and even larger general-purpose LLMs on wire connectivity accuracy and functional correctness. Our results highlight the critical role of representation design in enabling generative models for complex hardware design tasks.

</details>


### [460] [Physics Is All You Need? A Case Study in Physicist-Supervised AI Development of Scientific Software](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30353)
*Nhat-Minh Nguyen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过一个物理学家监督AI编码代理（Claude Code）构建可微分宇宙学微扰理论模块CLAX-PT的案例研究，揭示了当前AI代理在科学发现中仍高度依赖人类监督：其擅长局部优化但难以识别根本性建模错误，尤其当错误规避测试时；信任度取决于监督机制设计，而非模型本身能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究AI代理在真实科研任务中的角色定位（工具/合作者/研究者），并评估其自主科研能力边界，尤其在面对深层物理建模缺陷时的表现。

Method: 开展N=1量化案例研究：物理学家在12天、57次会话中监督Claude Code（Sonnet/Opus）构建JAX版CLAX-PT模块；系统记录并按干预等级分类15次监督事件；分析代理失败模式、oracle测试局限性及有效监督实践。

Result: AI代理能自主解决10个问题，2个需物理学家领域知识介入；3个根本性失败（均逃逸oracle检测）源于将‘症状缓解’误作‘根源解决’——持续调参于错误架构中，无法自发重构代码分支，仅靠注入物理概念（各向异性BAO阻尼）才触发重设计；另发现一例通过所有测试但物理意义缺失的‘校准修正’。三种监督实践被证实关键：多参数点测试、跨会话共享变更日志、禁止非物理解数值修补。

Conclusion: 当前AI代理尚不能替代科研人员进行可靠的第一性原理建模；其可信输出高度依赖精心设计的监督框架；突破瓶颈需代理具备主动提出架构替代方案、区分预测充分性与解释正确性的能力——这些非单纯模型缩放可解决。

Abstract: Are AI agents tools, co-authors, or researchers? We present a quantified case study ($N=1$): a physicist supervising an AI coding agent (Claude Code, Sonnet and Opus models) over 12 work days and 57 sessions to build CLAX-PT, a differentiable one-loop perturbation theory module in JAX. We documented and classified 15 supervision events by intervention level.
  The agent resolved ten autonomously by iterating against oracle tests. Two more by the physicist's domain knowledge. The three it could not -- all evaded oracle detection -- share a common property: the agent treated symptom reduction as root-cause resolution. It spent 33 of the 57 sessions adjusting coefficients within a code architecture that could not represent the target physics, and could not re-evaluate its CLASS-PT branch choice even when prompted to reconsider; only an injected physics concept (anisotropic BAO damping) triggered the redesign. Separately, the agent committed a calibrated correction that passed all oracle tests but corresponded to no quantity in the theory, predicting wrong values at any other cosmology.
  The fudge factor was caught and replaced within the same session. Three supervision practices proved critical for catching what oracle tests missed: testing at diverse parameter points beyond the fiducial calibration; shared changelogs that surfaced stalled exploration across sessions; and an explicit rule against unphysical numerical patches. In this case, supervision design, not model capability, determined whether the agent's output was trustworthy. Closing the gap would require agents that propose architectural alternatives rather than optimize within a given structure, and distinguish predictive adequacy from explanatory correctness -- capabilities not exhibited here, not obviously addressed by scaling alone. [Abridged.]

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [461] [FreeForm: Reduced-Order Deformable Simulation from Particle-Based Skinning Eigenmodes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29318)
*Donglai Xiang,Vismay Modi,Rishit Dagli,Ty Trusty,Gilles Daviet,Anka He Chen,Nicholas Sharp,David I. W. Levin*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于再生核粒子法（RKPM）的无网格、降阶超弹性物体仿真新方法，避免了传统网格依赖和神经场逐形优化的缺点，显著提升了训练速度并降低了仿真误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有降阶弹性动力学仿真方法依赖于难以获取的网格或需逐形优化的神经场，限制了复杂形状物体的高效建模与仿真。

Method: 采用再生核粒子法（RKPM）表示几何，通过求解弹性能量Hessian矩阵的广义特征系统，构建降阶蒙皮权重。

Result: 相比神经场逐形优化，训练速度快40倍；仿真误差低于有限元法收敛结果；支持多种几何表示（网格、高斯点阵）并在机器人仿真中验证有效。

Conclusion: RKPM为无网格、高效、高精度的降阶超弹性仿真提供了新范式，拓展了其在复杂几何与下游任务中的应用潜力。

Abstract: We present a novel formulation for mesh-free, reduced-order simulation of deformable hyperelastic objects. Existing work in reduced-order elastodynamic simulation represents the input geometry by either meshes, which can be difficult to obtain due to challenges in scanning and triangulating complex shapes, or by neural fields that require per-shape optimization. We propose to adopt a Reproducing Kernel Particle Method (RKPM) representation, which enables the construction of reduced-order skinning weights by solving a generalized eigensystem on the Hessian matrix of the elastic energy. We demonstrate that this formulation not only leads to a 40x training speedup compared with the per-shape optimization of neural fields, but also achieves lower simulation error when evaluated against the converged results of finite element method. We show our simulation results on a wide variety of objects in different representations including meshes and Gaussian splats, as well as the application of our method in the downstream task of robot simulation.

</details>


### [462] [Before the Shutter: Aesthetic and Actionable Portrait Photography Planning in 3D Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30318)
*Ruixiang Jiang,Chang Wen Chen*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出3D美学人像规划任务，通过构建摄影场景图，在拍摄前协同优化人物姿态、相机参数、布光与曝光，生成既美观又物理可行的人像拍摄方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算摄影方法多聚焦于2D图像后期处理，而拍摄前的三维场景协调规划（如姿态、相机、灯光）尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出摄影场景图（Photographic Scene Graph）表征场景功能、主客体关系及布光结构，并在此基础上进行美学引导的对比式规划，结合历史尝试与实时取景器观测进行优化。

Result: 在多种室内外场景实验中，该方法生成的人像在人类评估者和多模态大语言模型（MLLM）评测中均优于基线方法，且保持高物理合理性。

Conclusion: 本工作为从后期修图转向拍摄前计算化人像规划提供了可行路径，推动计算摄影向三维场景级智能预演发展。

Abstract: Portrait photography is largely decided before the shutter opens: the subject's pose, the camera configuration, and the lighting devices must be coordinated within the surrounding 3D scene. In contrast, most existing computational methods focus on post-production in 2D image space, such as retouching, relighting, or editing images that already exist; pre-capture photographic planning remains largely unexplored. We introduce 3D aesthetic portrait planning, the task of generating human pose, camera, lighting, and exposure plans that produce visually compelling portraits while satisfying geometric and photometric feasibility in a 3D scene. Our approach builds a Photographic Scene Graph that represents scene affordances, subject-scene relations, and portrait-relevant lighting structure. Built on this representation, we perform aesthetic-guided comparative planning over previous attempts and current viewfinder observations. Experiments across diverse indoor and outdoor scenes show that our method produces portraits preferred by human raters and MLLM evaluators over competitive baselines, while maintaining high physical plausibility. Together, our results suggest a path from post-capture correction toward pre-capture computational portrait planning. Project repository: https://github.com/songrise/Before-the-Shutter

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [463] [The incremental voter model: mean-field analysis and convergence to equilibrium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28984)
*Fei Cao,Xiaoqian Gong*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了增量选民模型（IVM），一种离散意见的多智能体系统，其中智能体在随机选择的说服者影响下逐步调整意见；通过推导大群体极限下的平均场非线性常微分方程组，严格刻画了意见分布的渐近行为，有助于理解社会影响与意见极化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为更精细地建模社会影响过程（尤其是意见极化），需超越经典选民模型的瞬时翻转假设，引入具有步进式、有偏意见更新机制的模型。

Method: 提出增量选民模型（IVM），定义离散意见集{-k,...,k}及受限于±1单位变化的更新规则；采用随机过程建模个体交互，并严格推导其大群体极限下的平均场非线性常微分方程系统。

Result: 获得了描述意见分布演化的闭式平均场ODE系统；基于该系统可 Rigorously 分析稳态、收敛性与极化现象等渐近行为。

Conclusion: IVM为离散意见动力学提供了更具现实基础和数学可处理性的新框架，拓展了经典选民模型，对复杂社会系统建模具有理论价值和启发意义。

Abstract: We introduce the incremental voter model (IVM), a discrete-opinion multi-agent system where agents undergo step-wise transitions biased by the opinion of a randomly selected persuader. Our incremental voter model comprises a large population of interacting agents, each holding an opinion represented by an element of the discrete set $\{-k,\ldots,0,\ldots,k\}, k \in \mathbb{N}_{+}$. At each update step as time progresses, a pair of distinct agents are selected independently and uniformly at random from the population, and the first agent (viewed as the ``listener'') updates its opinion based on that of the second (viewed as the ``persuader''), adopting a new opinion that differs from its current one by at most one unit. By deriving the mean-field system of nonlinear ordinary differential equations (ODEs) that governs the large-population limit of the agent-based model, we develop a rigorous mathematical framework to study the asymptotic behavior of the opinion distribution in the mean-field limit. These results contribute to a deeper understanding of social influence processes in complex systems, particularly in modeling opinion polarization, and may guide the formulation of more advanced models in future research.

</details>


### [464] [LLM-ALSO: LLM-Driven Adaptive Learning-Signal Optimization for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29293)
*Xiaoguang Wu,Zhi Zheng,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出LLM-ALSO，一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的迭代式自适应学习信号优化框架，用于解决多智能体强化学习（MARL）在稀疏奖励场景下的训练引导难题。该方法通过批判型LLM诊断、生成型LLM提案与分支验证三阶段闭环，实现安全、阶段感知的学习信号演化，在多个稀疏奖励合作MARL任务中显著提升性能与训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MARL方法在稀疏奖励环境下难以提供有效训练引导，依赖人工设计或领域知识，而现有LLM方法多为单智能体、一次性且缺乏对MARL动态训练过程的充分验证。

Method: 提出LLM-ALSO框架：包含Criti LLM（诊断学习与协调失败）、Generator LLM（基于诊断生成奖励塑形配置）、分支验证机制（短视界验证后才纳入主训练），实现迭代式、阶段感知、风险可控的学习信号优化。

Result: 在多个稀疏奖励合作MARL任务上，LLM-ALSO显著提升了稀疏评估性能和学习效率。

Conclusion: LLM-ALSO为MARL提供了可扩展、低干预、高鲁棒性的自动化学习信号设计范式，验证了LLM作为MARL训练期‘智能导师’的可行性与价值。

Abstract: Effective training-time guidance is central to multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), yet remains difficult in sparse-reward settings where weak supervision limits coordination and policy improvement, and existing methods often require substantial domain expertise or manual design effort. Large language models (LLMs) provide a promising alternative for flexible learning-signal design, yet existing LLM-based methods remain largely single-agent-oriented, one-shot, or weakly validated for the evolving training dynamics of cooperative MARL. To address these limitations, we propose LLM-ALSO, an iterative LLM-driven adaptive learning-signal optimization framework for MARL. Rather than directly deploying LLM-generated rewards, LLM-ALSO decomposes adaptation into iterative diagnosis, proposal, and validation: a Critic LLM diagnoses stage-specific learning and coordination failures from sparse-return metrics and compact behavior evidence, a Generator LLM proposes candidate reward-shaping configurations conditioned on the diagnosis, and branch-validation feedback refines candidates before they affect the main training trajectory. Through short-horizon validation and stage-aware adaptation, LLM-ALSO promotes only validated updates into training, reducing the risk of unreliable LLM-generated modifications. Experiments on sparse-reward cooperative MARL tasks show that LLM-ALSO improves sparse-evaluation performance and learning efficiency.

</details>


### [465] [DynaGraph: Lightweight Multi-Model Interaction Framework via Dynamic Topological Reconfiguration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29511)
*Yanxing Guo,Zihao Zheng,Fangzhou Wu,Ling Liang,Lin Bao,Zongwei Wang,Yimao Cai*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出DynaGraph框架，通过动态拓扑重构和轻量级多模型协作，在保持高性能推理能力的同时显著降低计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大模型在复杂推理任务中存在计算冗余问题；任务分解方法面临静态拓扑易传播错误、动态代理易发散和内存膨胀的两难困境。

Method: 提出DynaGraph：执行层采用时分复用PEFT适配器共享基础模型；路由层由Evaluator监控置信度，触发细粒度修补或子图重建实现自修复。

Result: 在StrategyQA、MATH、FinQA上，8B模型性能接近72B单体模型（如StrategyQA达87.6%，MATH达82.7%），延迟降低68.1%，Token消耗减少68.6%。

Conclusion: DynaGraph实现了高效、鲁棒且可部署于消费级GPU的动态推理架构，有效平衡性能与效率。

Abstract: Tackling complex reasoning tasks typically relies on massive monolithic LLMs, which suffer from severe computational redundancy. While task decomposition through structured pipelines or multi-agent collaborations offers an alternative, these approaches inevitably fall into a critical dilemma: predefined static topologies are highly vulnerable to cascading errors, whereas unconstrained dynamic agents suffer from trajectory divergence and unpredictable memory bloat. To address this, we present DynaGraph, a lightweight multi-model framework driven by dynamic topological reconfiguration. At the execution level, DynaGraph multiplexes time-division PEFT adapters over a shared base model, enabling both full system training and inference deployment on a single consumer-grade GPU. At the routing level, the Evaluator continuously monitors execution confidence to trigger hierarchical self-healing: Fine-grained Patching for localized data gaps and Subgraph Reconstruction for severe logical ruptures. Experiments on StrategyQA, MATH, and FinQA demonstrate our 8B model closely approximates the reasoning capabilities of a 72B monolithic model (e.g., 87.6% on StrategyQA, 82.7% on MATH). Furthermore, it reduces latency by up to 68.1% and token consumption by 68.6% compared to unconstrained dynamic architectures.

</details>


### [466] [CONCAT: Consensus- and Confidence-Driven Ad Hoc Teaming for Efficient LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29612)
*Ziyang Ma,Dingyi Zhang,Sichu Liang,Jiajia Chu,Pengfei Xia,Hui Zang,Deyu Zhou*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的多智能体协作框架CONCAT，通过共识与置信度驱动的临时组队，减少通信开销，提升效率与泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体系统虽性能强，但通信开销大；已有优化方法依赖额外训练，牺牲泛化性与通用性。

Method: CONCAT基于初始答案聚类代理，按置信度选簇领袖，利用心智理论设计启发式函数预测领袖间协作收益，并据此裁剪低收益通信，构建动态多智能体网络。

Result: 在三个LLM和三个基准上，CONCAT相较LLM-Debate效率提升达2.02倍，优于AgentDropout等需训练方法，在Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct上平均延迟降低50.1%，且无需任务特定训练。

Conclusion: CONCAT是一种高效、通用、免训练的多智能体协作新范式，兼顾性能、效率与泛化能力。

Abstract: Although large language model (LLM) based multi-agent systems (MAS) show their capability to solve complex tasks and achieve higher performance over single agent systems, they lead to huge computational overheads because of heavy communication between agents. Previous research has made efforts to train a sparse multi-agent graph or fine-tune a planner to orchestrate the workflow better. However, such extra training processes introduce computational costs and limit MAS to specific domains, therefore compromising their generalizability. In this paper, we propose CONCAT, a training-free multi-agent collaboration framework based on CONsensus and Confidence-driven Ad hoc Teaming to efficiently organize agent interactions. Specifically, agents are clustered based on their initial answers, and leaders of each cluster are selected based on the agents' confidence. Then, a heuristic function based on the Theory of Mind is designed to predict the collaboration benefits between every two leaders according to their answers and confidence. Finally, an ad hoc multi-agent network is organized after evicting a percentage of communications based on the predicted benefits. Experiments across three LLMs and three benchmarks show that CONCAT achieves up to 2.02x higher efficiency (accuracy/latency ratio) than LLM-Debate and outperforms training-aware methods such as AgentDropout, while reducing average latency by 50.1% on Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct, without any task-specific training.

</details>


### [467] [Evolve as a Team: Collaborative Self-Evolution for LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29790)
*Zhezheng Hao,Tianfu Wang,Huanshuo Dong,Ziyan Liu,Hong Wang,Xiankun Lin,Qiang Lin,Can Wang,Hande Dong,Jiawei Chen*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出Meta-Team框架，通过协作式自演化实现基于执行经验的多智能体系统（MAS）持续优化，显著提升复杂长周期任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统在真实任务中易失败，且设计阶段难以完全避免；而基于执行经验的演化又因经验冗长、多智能体交互交织而难以定位改进点。

Method: 提出Meta-Team框架：保留各智能体执行上下文，协调任务后通信以交换分布式证据，并支持行为层、协作层和团队组织层的多尺度自演化。

Result: 在六个长周期代理基准测试中，Meta-Team持续优于单智能体系统、人工设计的MAS及先前的MAS演化方法；分析表明其演化更可靠、可扩展。

Conclusion: Meta-Team为经验驱动的MAS演化提供了可行、高效且可扩展的新范式，推动了多智能体系统的自主演进能力。

Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) have emerged as an effective paradigm for complex and long-horizon tasks. However, in real-world tasks, MAS often exhibit various failures during execution and such failures are difficult to eliminate during design. This motivates experience-driven MAS evolution, where a system improves based on its own execution experience. Yet such evolution is challenging because MAS experience is prolonged and intricate, interleaving multiple agents' execution chains and communication messages, which makes it difficult to identify what should be improved. To address this challenge, we propose Meta-Team, an experience-driven MAS evolution framework based on collaborative self-evolution. Meta-Team preserves the execution context of each agent and coordinates post-task communication, enabling agents to exchange distributed evidence for evolution. Building on this design, Meta-Team conducts multi-scale self-evolution, transforming execution experience into reusable improvements to agent behaviors, inter-agent coordination, and team-level organization. Across six long-horizon agent benchmarks, Meta-Team consistently outperforms single-agent systems, hand-crafted MAS, and prior MAS evolution methods; further analyses demonstrate that Meta-Team enables more reliable and scalable MAS self-evolution.

</details>


### [468] [Evolutionary Dynamics of Cooperation in Next-Generation LLM Agent Systems: A Cross-Provider Empirical Extension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29874)
*Francisco León Zúñiga Bolívar*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文扩展了Willis等人关于大语言模型（LLM）在迭代囚徒困境（IPD）中合作行为的基准研究，测试2025–2026年发布的四款前沿模型（Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.4 Mini），发现合作偏差仍普遍存在（H1），但不同厂商间策略差异显著（H3）；自省式提示（Self-Refine）可提升攻击能力均衡性（H2部分支持），而噪声鲁棒性仅呈方向性改善但未达统计显著（H4）；最终指出厂商身份比模型代际更决定行为，噪声仍是普遍挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究新一代大语言模型代理是否继承前代的合作偏好，或因模型规模扩大与供应商多样化而改变其在多智能体竞争环境中的均衡行为。

Method: 在Willis等人建立的基于演化博弈论与迭代囚徒困境（IPD）的基准上进行扩展：测试四款2025–2026年发布的前沿模型，采用三种提示风格（Default、Prose、Self-Refine）和四种种群构成（平衡/偏置、有/无噪声），并使用Moran过程模拟500次迭代评估均衡行为。

Result: （1）合作偏差持续存在（9/12模型-提示组合在无噪声平衡条件下倾向合作）；（2）跨厂商差异显著（如Gemini 2.5 Flash在偏置下达77%激进均衡，GPT-5.4 Mini在Self-Refine下达70%合作均衡）；（3）Self-Refine提示提升ICD（攻击能力均衡指标），Claude Sonnet 4.6 Refine达最高0.913，但Default/Prose无系统性改善；（4）噪声敏感性略有下降（Claude Sonnet 4.6平均降约7个百分点），但跨研究差异不具统计显著性。

Conclusion: 模型厂商身份比模型代际或参数规模更能预测均衡行为；合作偏好具有延续性，但厂商策略取向主导行为分化；噪声仍是所有模型面临的共性挑战，当前提示工程尚未稳健提升鲁棒性。

Abstract: Do next-generation LLM agents inherit the cooperative biases documented in their predecessors, or does scale and provider diversity reshape equilibrium behaviour in competitive multi-agent settings? Willis et al. established a benchmark for this question using evolutionary game theory and the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma (IPD), finding consistent cooperative biases in ChatGPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. We extend this benchmark to four frontier models released in 2025-2026 - Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.4 Mini - applying the identical protocol across three prompting styles (Default, Prose, Self-Refine) and four population compositions (balanced and biased, with and without noise). Cooperative bias persists across providers (H1): nine of twelve model-prompt combinations favour cooperative equilibria in balanced noiseless conditions. Cross-provider divergence is substantial (H3): Gemini 2.5 Flash reaches up to 77% aggressive equilibria under biased conditions, while GPT-5.4 Mini reaches 70% cooperative equilibria under Self-Refine. Support for aggressive capability parity is partial (H2): Self-Refine raises ICD in all models and Claude Sonnet 4.6 Refine achieves the highest ICD in the dataset (0.913), but Default and Prose prompts show no systematic narrowing. Evidence on noise robustness is directionally positive but not robustly confirmed (H4): with n=500 Moran iterations per condition, average noise sensitivity is approximately 6 percentage points for Claude Sonnet 4.6 versus 13 pp for Claude 3.5 Sonnet, but this cross-study gap is not statistically significant once the predecessor's unreported sampling error is propagated. Provider identity, rather than model generation, is the strongest correlate of equilibrium outcomes; noise remains a universal challenge regardless of model size or vintage.

</details>


### [469] [Discovering Cooperative Pipelines: Autoresearch for Sequential Social Dilemmas](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30003)
*Víctor Gallego*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两层自动研究框架，外层AI研究员代理自主优化内层大语言模型（LLM）策略合成系统，以提升多智能体社会困境中的合作效果；该方法在多个任务和目标下超越人工设计基线，并揭示了目标依赖的信息设计机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多智能体序贯社会困境（SSDs）中合作策略设计困难的问题，探索如何通过自动化方式优化LLM策略合成流程，尤其针对不同社会福利目标（如功利主义效率与罗尔斯最大最小原则）的适配性。

Method: 构建两层自研框架：外层研究员代理（coding agent）读取、编辑内层LLM策略合成系统的源代码，包括系统提示、反馈函数、辅助库与迭代逻辑，运行评估并决策保留方案；在Cleanup与Gathering两个游戏、两类LLM及两类福利目标下进行实验验证。

Result: 研究员代理稳定超越手工设计基线，显著降低运行方差，优于仅调优提示的方法；且发现的合成流程具有目标依赖性——仅在maximin目标下引入显式公平机制，该机制不在其自身通用提示或效率优化流程中出现。

Conclusion: 自动研究可有效驱动面向特定社会目标的策略合成架构演化，支持‘信息设计’视角：研究员根据福利目标决定向受限理性合成器披露何种信息，从而实现目标导向的机制涌现。

Abstract: We study two-level autoresearch for cooperation: an outer-loop AI agent autonomously redesigns the inner-loop pipeline of an LLM policy-synthesis system for multi-agent Sequential Social Dilemmas (SSDs). A researcher agent $\mathcal{R}$ (run as a coding agent) reads the inner-loop source code, edits system prompts, feedback functions, helper libraries, and iteration logic, runs evaluations, and decides what to keep, following the autoresearch paradigm. Across two games (Cleanup and Gathering), two policy-synthesizer LLMs, and two welfare objectives (utilitarian efficiency and Rawlsian maximin), the researcher reliably exceeds hand-designed baselines, sharply tightens run-to-run variance, and outperforms prompt-only optimization. The discovered pipelines are objective-dependent: only under maximin does the researcher inject an explicit fairness mechanism into synthesizer pipelines, a class of mechanism that is absent from its own objective-agnostic system prompt and from every efficiency-optimized pipeline. This supports an information-design reading in which the researcher chooses what to reveal to the boundedly rational synthesizer as a function of the welfare objective. Code at https://github.com/vicgalle/autoresearch-social-dilemmas.

</details>


### [470] [When Cloud Agents Meet Device Agents: Lessons from Hybrid Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30102)
*Corrado Rainone,Davide Belli,Bence Major,Arash Behboodi*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了混合多智能体系统（MAS）中云端大语言模型（LLM）与设备端小语言模型（SLM）协同推理的设计空间，分析了任务精度、成本和边缘能耗之间的权衡关系，发现最优架构高度依赖具体任务，且更多前沿算力并不总带来更好性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合MAS设计缺乏通用原则，常依赖领域特化的临时决策，导致任务精度、成本和边缘能耗三者耦合且难以优化。

Method: 适配两种典型MAS架构以支持混合推理，并系统评估不同设计选择对功耗、成本和性能Pareto前沿的影响。

Result: SLM可有效借助LLM提升性能，但最优混合架构高度任务依赖；增加前沿算力不一定提升整体性能；揭示了精度、成本与能耗间的复杂权衡关系。

Conclusion: 混合MAS设计需任务定制化，不能简单堆砌算力；亟需建立面向能效-成本-性能联合优化的通用设计原则。

Abstract: The design space of agentic AI inference spans two extremes: frontier large language models (LLMs), typically hosted in the cloud and offering strong performance across a wide range of tasks at substantially high cost, and more cost-efficient small language models (SLMs), which are amenable to on-device inference. Hybrid multi-agent systems (MASs) combining on-device and cloud models offer a promising middle ground, but they also introduce a complex and poorly understood design space in which task accuracy, monetary cost, and edge energy consumption are tightly coupled; in the absence of general design principles, hybrid components, although not the most prevalent choice, are typically introduced through ad hoc decisions tailored to specific domains. In this work, we examine this design space more systematically. We adapt two representative MAS architectures to support hybrid inference and study how individual design choices shift the operating point along the Pareto frontier of power, cost, and performance. Our findings paint a nuanced picture of hybrid MAS design: while SLMs can effectively benefit from LLM assistance, the optimal architecture is highly task-dependent, and greater frontier-level compute does not consistently translate to better performance.

</details>


### [471] [Unifying Temporal and Structural Credit Assignment in LLM-Based Multi-Agent Prompt Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30227)
*Wenwu Li,Yuran Song,Mingze Zhao,Bo Jin,Wenhao Li*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于时间与结构信用分配的离散优化方法，用于提升多智能体系统（MAS）中大语言模型的协同推理能力，通过分解误差信号并迭代优化角色提示和聚合协议，显著降低了查询复杂度并提高了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）虽能增强大语言模型（LLM）的复杂推理能力，但其离散、不可微的计算图和稀疏的全局监督信号使得优化困难；现有黑箱优化器难以将轨迹级失败归因于局部组件，导致低效且高方差的探索。

Method: 提出时间信用分配（利用状态空间瓶颈识别关键轮次）和结构信用分配（利用静态角色策略隔离智能体贡献），并基于此设计一种离散、可语言化（verbalized）的块坐标下降算法，交替优化角色提示和聚合协议，使用LLM生成的“代理梯度”精准定位并更新薄弱环节。

Result: 在多个推理基准上，该方法显著降低了查询复杂度，同时提升了性能，展现出更强的可解释性和自我改进能力。

Conclusion: 引入结构性归纳偏置以解耦误差信号是实现可处理的MAS优化的关键路径；所提方法为构建自优化、可解释的多智能体推理系统提供了新范式。

Abstract: While Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) empower Large Language Models to tackle complex reasoning tasks through collaborative interaction, optimizing their dynamics remains a formidable challenge due to the discrete, non-differentiable nature of the computation graph and the sparsity of global supervisory signals. Existing black-box optimizers struggle to attribute trajectory-level failure to specific local components, resulting in inefficient, high-variance exploration. We argue that tractable MAS optimization needs structural inductive biases to disentangle error signals. We propose temporal and structural credit assignment, which decomposes the objective along two axes: (i) temporal credit, using state-space bottlenecks to identify critical rounds, and (ii) structural credit, using stationary role policies to isolate agent contributions. Leveraging these decomposed signals, we introduce a discrete, verbalized block coordinate descent algorithm for iterative refinement. Rather than indiscriminate global updates, it alternates between optimizing role prompts and aggregation protocols, using LLM-generated "proxy gradients" to target only the identified weak links. Across diverse reasoning benchmarks, our approach substantially reduces query complexity while improving performance, providing a principled and interpretable path toward self-improving MAS.

</details>


### [472] [EASE Configuration Facilitates A Reproducible Science of LLM Social Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30258)
*Sneheel Sarangi,Maximilian Puelma Touzel,Aurélien Bück-Kaeffer,Zachary Yang,Jean-François Godbout,Reihaneh Rabbany*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出EASE框架（环境、代理、仿真引擎、评估指标）以标准化LLM多智能体社会仿真，开发开源工具SiliSocS，并通过三个案例研究验证其在可复现性、深度分析与扩展已有研究方面的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM社会仿真系统缺乏架构标准化，导致研究不可复现、下游评估困难。

Method: 提出模块化EASE框架（Environments, Agents, Simulation engines, Evaluation metrics），构建基于该框架的开源仿真平台SiliSocS，并设计实验研究范式支持围绕明确科研问题开展仿真工作流。

Result: 实现了高度可配置、可复现的LLM社会仿真系统；通过三个案例展示了对现有问题的全面评估、复杂问题的深入探究及对已有研究的拓展能力；揭示了当前建模方法的局限性并量化了设计选择对结果的影响。

Conclusion: EASE框架与SiliSocS为LLM多智能体社会仿真提供了严谨、可复现、可扩展的科学基础，推动该领域向系统化、工程化方向发展。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly deployed to simulate social interactions, yet many of the existing simulators remain ad hoc and monolithic. This lack of architectural standardization prevents reproducible research and complicates downstream evaluation. We advance a rigorous science of LLM-based multi-agent simulation by modularizing core components into Environments, Agents, Simulation engines, and Evaluation metrics (EASE). We demonstrate the utility of EASE configuration by wrapping it in an experimental study schema for orchestrating workflows centered around answering explicit research questions in generated scenarios. We contribute SiliSocS, an open-source, research-ready Silicon Society Sandbox implementing a study-structured EASE configuration to enable highly configurable and reproducible LLM-based social simulations. Using SiliSocS and EASE, we present three case studies, showcasing the system's comprehensive assessment of existing questions, ability to dive deeper into complex questions, and elaboration of existing studies, respectively. Together, these case studies highlight the limitations of current modeling approaches and isolate the impacts of design choices on key results.

</details>


### [473] [SpecBench: Evaluating Specification-Level Reasoning for Software Engineering LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30314)
*Grant Hamblin,Kevin Song,Zhanda Zhu,Anand Jayarajan,Sihang Liu,Nandita Vijaykumar,Gennady Pekhimenko*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出SpecBench，首个专注于评估软件工程代理在规格设计阶段推理能力的基准，聚焦于识别初始设计提案中的缺陷（如遗漏、歧义、不一致等），任务源自真实开源项目的RFC流程，并在5个知名仓库上验证了当前SOTA模型仅达44.4%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准（如SWE-Bench）仅关注代码实现，假设规格已完备正确，但现实中复杂系统初始规格常不完整或有缺陷，亟需评估代理在规格审查与完善阶段的能力。

Method: 构建SpecBench：基于5个开源项目（Kubernetes、React等）的真实RFC流程，为每个任务提供初始提案、代码库和历史RFC讨论；要求代理识别规格缺陷，并以专家维护者的历史批评为黄金标准进行评估。

Result: 在SpecBench上评测当前最优SWE代理GPT-5.4，准确率为44.4%，表明现有模型在规格级推理方面仍严重不足。

Conclusion: SpecBench填补了软件工程代理评估中规格设计环节的空白，揭示了模型在无执行反馈下进行系统级设计推理的巨大挑战，为未来研究提供了新方向和基准。

Abstract: Software engineering (SWE) agents are transitioning from code generation to full software development lifecycle automation. A critical phase in this lifecycle is specification design: transforming initial proposals into carefully considered requirements through expert review. Existing benchmarks such as SWE-Bench are implementation-focused by measuring the agent's ability to generate code given fixed, precise design requirements. This formulation assumes specifications are correct and complete. In real-world complex and critical software systems, initial specifications are often incomplete and flawed, requiring extensive expert reviews and revisions before being accepted for implementation. To fill this gap, we introduce SpecBench to evaluate specification-level reasoning: the ability to generate complete, unambiguous, consistent, and correct system specifications. SpecBench tasks are derived from the Request for Comments (RFC) process used by mature open-source projects. For each task, an agent is given an initial design proposal, the project codebase, and all past project RFC discussions. The agent is tasked with identifying specification deficiencies: omissions, ambiguities, inconsistencies, or incorrect assumptions in the initial proposal. We evaluate predictions against critiques raised by expert maintainers during historical RFC reviews. SpecBench contains tasks from 5 diverse repositories: Kubernetes, React, Rust, TVM, and vLLM. We evaluate state-of-the-art SWE agents on SpecBench, analyzing their capacity to reason about system design without execution feedback. The best performing agent, GPT-5.4, achieves 44.4% accuracy.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [474] [One Mask to Rule Them All: On Hidden Facts after Editing and How to Find Them](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28839)
*Ali Holmov,Paul Youssef,Nandi Schoots,Christin Seifert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了ROME和MEMIT等知识编辑方法的内部机制，发现尽管不同事实编辑导致不同的权重变化，但它们实际上依赖于同一组关键权重；通过训练一个二值掩码识别出该公共子集，并验证其对编辑效果的关键作用，揭示编辑本质是抑制而非覆盖知识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识编辑方法（如ROME、MEMIT）主要通过修改MLP权重更新模型中的事实关联，但其内部工作机制尚不清楚；作者旨在探究这些方法是否依赖于一种通用机制，而非针对每个事实的特异性调整。

Method: 作者分析ROME和MEMIT编辑后的权重变化，训练一个紧凑的二值掩码来识别对编辑起关键作用的权重子集，并评估该掩码在训练/测试集上对编辑的可逆性；进一步分析掩码影响下的注意力变化，并在编辑过程中注入掩码以检验其必要性。

Result: 识别出一组跨不同事实编辑共享的关键权重子集；该掩码能逆转80%（训练集）和70%以上（测试集）的编辑效果；掩码通过消除后层的过注意力（overattention）实现逆转；注入掩码使编辑成功率从98%骤降至38%；编辑本质上是抑制原有知识而非覆盖。

Conclusion: ROME和MEMIT虽修改不同权重，但依赖同一功能子空间完成编辑；该子空间对应后层注意力调控机制；这一发现有助于检测和防御恶意知识编辑，并解释了编辑无法泛化至相关事实的原因。

Abstract: Knowledge editing methods such as ROME and MEMIT update factual associations in transformer models by modifying MLP weights. While evaluated mainly by output behavior, their internal mechanism remains underexplored. We investigate whether edits rely on a common mechanism, regardless of which fact is modified. Despite fact-specific weight changes, we argue that ROME and MEMIT target the same subset of weights critical for maintaining edits. To isolate this subset, we train a compact binary mask over the edited weights. The mask reverses 80% of edits on the training set and over 70% on the test set, confirming that diverse edits share a common functional structure. Our analysis reveals that the mask reverses edits by eliminating overattention in later layers. Additionally, we show that injecting the mask during editing drops editing success from 98% to 38%, demonstrating that this mechanism is necessary for edits to succeed. Our finding that edits suppress rather than overwrite knowledge explains why ROME and MEMIT fail to propagate changes to related facts. The identified common functional subspace informs detection and defense against unwanted edits.

</details>


### [475] [Representation Signatures and Risk-Feedback Alignment in LLM Trading Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28850)
*Weicheng Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）代理在金融决策环境中的行为对齐与表征动态，利用可审计交易测试平台TradeArena，发现模型失效前存在可观测的表征退化信号（如规划嵌入漂移、风险-计划表征分离、流形有效秩收缩），并验证其鲁棒性；进一步表明结构化风险反馈可作为无需微调的外部对齐信号，但效果因模型而异；最后揭示LLM在相关资产集中暴露上的推理盲点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解LLM代理在真实金融压力下的行为对齐机制与失效前兆，弥补当前缺乏可审计、可解释的金融决策过程分析框架的空白。

Method: 基于TradeArena测试平台，结合多维度表征分析（规划嵌入、融合风险-计划表征、流形诊断）、80个滚动失效锚点的鲁棒性检验、多种压力测试（无CoT权重、词汇控制、OHLCV噪声、虚假审计报告），以及51只股票的日内实证实验。

Result: 发现失效前存在三类稳定表征信号（嵌入漂移、表征分离、有效秩收缩）；该收缩现象在不同嵌入方法和扰动下保持鲁棒；结构化风险反馈可提升部分模型的校准或收益/回撤，但非普适；LLM常在协方差盲区中做出不合理集中持仓推理。

Conclusion: 可审计的风险反馈与表征轨迹能有效刻画LLM金融推理的对齐状态、漂移趋势与失效临界点，支持‘对齐研究’而非‘盈利主张’。

Abstract: We study behavioral alignment and representation dynamics of large language model (LLM) agents in financial decision environments. Using TradeArena, an auditable trading-agent testbed with risk reports, execution simulation, memory, and replayable trajectories, we analyze how rationales, positions, and interventions evolve under market stress. We find measurable pre-failure signatures: planning embeddings drift from normal-state centroids, fused plan-risk representations separate normal from pre-drawdown states, and manifold diagnostics show effective-rank contraction before failures. To address small-sample and embedding-choice concerns, we use 80 rolling failure anchors across eight LLM trajectories and show that contraction persists across hash, LSA, Transformer, and white-box hidden-state probes. Stress tests with CoT-free target weights, lexical controls, OHLCV noise, and false-audit reports indicate that rationale-level contraction can vanish without rationales, while intent-space contraction may remain; lexical diversity does not collapse; and fused signatures remain informative under noise. We also find that structured risk feedback can act as an external alignment signal without fine-tuning, but not as a universal performance enhancer: true audit feedback improves calibration for some models, return and drawdown for others, and reveals cases where hidden or placebo feedback has higher short-horizon return but weaker alignment diagnostics. Finally, a 51-stock intraday experiment reveals a correlation blind spot: LLM rationales often justify concentrated exposure to coupled assets that the risk layer repeatedly clips, with a rolling Markowitz baseline as a covariance reference. These results support a research claim rather than a profitability claim: auditable risk feedback and representation trajectories reveal when LLM financial reasoning is aligning, drifting, or failing.

</details>


### [476] [Mechanistic origins of catastrophic forgetting: why RL preserves circuits better than SFT?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28860)
*Jeanmely Rojas Nunez,Viraj Sawant,Nathan Allen,Nomgondalai Amgalanbaatar,Yannis Zongo,Vasu Sharma,Maheep Chaudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探究了强化学习（RL）相较于监督微调（SFT）在大语言模型微调中更有效缓解灾难性遗忘的机制原因，提出‘差分电路脆弱性’指标，在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct模型上发现：SFT适应快但严重破坏内部计算回路，RL适应慢但更好保留基座模型回路，支持‘回路保留’是RL抗遗忘的关键机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释为何强化学习（RL）比监督微调（SFT）更能缓解大语言模型微调中的灾难性遗忘——从行为现象深入到内部计算机制层面。

Method: 提出‘差分电路脆弱性’（differential circuit vulnerability）这一头层级指标，量化微调对模型内部计算回路的破坏程度；在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct模型上，对比RL与SFT在科学问答任务微调过程中回路变化与能力保留情况。

Result: 发现明确的机制权衡：SFT任务适应更快，但导致更大规模的回路退化和先验能力遗忘；RL虽适应较慢，但显著保留更多原始计算回路；回路保留程度与抗遗忘能力正相关。

Conclusion: 内部计算回路的机械性保留是RL优于SFT抵抗灾难性遗忘的重要机制基础，为理解微调鲁棒性提供了可解释的神经机制视角。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) frequently induces catastrophic forgetting of prior capabilities. Recent work has shown that reinforcement learning (RL) retains prior capabilities more effectively than supervised fine-tuning (SFT), attributing this to policy-gradient updates remaining closer to the base policy \cite{shenfeld2025rl}. We extend this behavioral account to the mechanistic level and ask whether RL's advantage is mirrored by stronger preservation of internal computational circuits. We introduce differential circuit vulnerability, a head-level measure of how much a circuit degrades under fine-tuning, and use it to compare RL and SFT on Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct adapted to scientific question-answering. We find a clear mechanistic trade-off: SFT adapts more rapidly to the target task but produces substantially greater circuit disruption and forgetting of prior capabilities, whereas RL preserves a larger fraction of the base circuit at the cost of slower task adaptation. These findings suggest that circuit preservation may help explain why RL is more robust to catastrophic forgetting. We released our code here: https://github.com/rl-sft-circuit-research/differential-circuit-vulnerability.

</details>


### [477] [Molecular Lead Optimization via Agentic Tool Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28862)
*Lingxiao Li,Haobo Zhang,Ruohao Fan,Bin Chen,Jiayu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TRACE，一种基于大语言模型的轨迹感知推理代理，用于药物发现中的先导化合物优化，通过序列化决策提升ADMET性质优化效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有先导化合物优化方法多为单步优化，无法考虑连续设计决策的长期影响，难以兼顾ADMET性质改进与关键药效结构保留。

Method: 提出TRACE框架，将工具选择建模为面向轨迹的序列决策问题，利用大语言模型进行推理，在满足结构约束下进行前瞻性分子优化。

Result: 在多个ADMET优化任务实验中，TRACE相比基线模型实现了更高的优化成功率、更大的性质提升幅度、更高的分子有效性及更好的结构相似性保持能力。

Conclusion: TRACE验证了轨迹感知与大语言模型推理在先导化合物优化中的有效性，为AI驱动的药物发现提供了新范式。

Abstract: Drug discovery is a lengthy and resource-intensive process composed of multiple stages. Among these stages, lead optimization plays a critical role in transforming early hit compounds into viable drug candidates. This stage requires improving ADMET-related properties through subtle structural refinement while preserving key molecular substructures responsible for binding affinity to disease targets. Recent advances in artificial intelligence have shown promise in accelerating various aspects of drug discovery; however, most existing approaches to lead optimization rely on one-step molecular optimization, which fail to account for the long-term consequences of sequential design decisions. To address this limitation, we propose TRACE, a trajectory-aware, LLM-reasoning agent for molecular lead optimization that formulates tool selection as a sequential decision-making problem over action trajectories. Given a lead molecule and an optimization objective, TRACE makes trajectory-aware decisions over molecular optimization tools, enabling forward-looking refinement under structural constraints. Experiments on multiple ADMET optimization tasks show that our agent achieves higher optimization success, larger property improvements, and higher validity, while preserving molecular similarity compared to baseline models.

</details>


### [478] [Self-Play Reinforcement Learning under Imperfect Information in Big 2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28863)
*Aalok Patwa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在不完全信息多人游戏Big 2中，不同强化学习算法（如PPO、Q-learning等）的性能表现，发现PPO在多种对手类型下表现最优，并指出适度的熵正则化和当前策略自博弈能提升训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验智能体在隐藏信息、稀疏奖励和非平稳对手下的行为能力，Big 2作为具有不完全信息、多人互动、延迟奖励和可变动作集的典型场景。

Method: 构建了一个用于Big 2的自博弈强化学习框架，统一环境、输入表示、训练预算与评估协议，对比PPO、蒙特卡洛Q近似、SARSA和Q-learning；引入熵正则化与不同自博弈策略（当前策略vs检查点）。

Result: PPO显著优于其他价值近似方法；适度熵正则化防止策略过早确定；当前策略自博弈比检查点自博弈或固定对手训练提供更优的有限预算课程学习效果。

Conclusion: Big 2是一个适合研究深度强化学习在不完全信息、多人交互、延迟奖励及可变动作空间下性能的可控基准环境。

Abstract: Imperfect-information multiplayer games test whether agents can act under hidden information, sparse rewards, and non-stationary opponents. We study these challenges in Big 2, a four-player imperfect-information card game. We develop a self-play RL framework for Big 2 that enables controlled comparisons between policy-gradient and value-approximating agents. Under a common environment, input representation, training budget, and evaluation protocol, PPO outperforms Monte Carlo Q approximation, SARSA, and Q-learning against random, greedy, and heuristic Big 2 opponents. We further find that moderate entropy regularization improves PPO by preventing the policy from becoming overly deterministic, and that current-policy self-play provides a stronger finite-budget curriculum than checkpoint self-play or fixed-opponent training. Together, these results show that Big 2 is a useful controlled setting for studying deep RL under imperfect information, multiplayer interaction, delayed rewards, and variable action sets.

</details>


### [479] [Emergent Semantic Representations in World Models through Physical Interaction without Linguistic Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28865)
*Jiayi Fang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了无语言监督的物理探索如何塑造世界模型的表征，发现其潜在空间自发发展出与物理几何结构一致的空间语义结构，验证了几何结构是世界模型表征的组织原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在没有语言监督的情况下，仅通过物理探索，世界模型能学到什么；特别关注其潜在表征是否受物理世界几何结构所组织。

Method: 使用基于VAE的世界模型，在随机具身探索数据上训练；通过方向准确率、位置表征相似性（RSA）等指标量化潜在空间的几何结构；分析预测性能与语义对齐的协同演化关系；并通过调节KL正则化强度（beta）进行因果干预实验（双敲除）。

Result: 训练后的潜在空间展现出显著优于随机编码器的几何结构（方向准确率0.677 vs. 0.547；位置RSA 0.192 vs. 0.029）；预测性能与语义对齐随训练同步提升（Spearman r=-0.61）；KL正则过强（beta=0.1）导致二者同时崩溃，而减弱正则（beta=0.001）可同时恢复。

Conclusion: 物理世界的几何结构是世界模型表征的根本组织原则；该发现为构建语义 grounded 的具身智能体提供了理论基础与设计指导。

Abstract: What does a world model learn from physical exploration, without any linguistic supervision? We argue the answer is organized by a single principle: the geometric structure of the physical world. Training a VAE-based world model on random embodied exploration, we find that its latent space develops spatial semantic structure that mirrors physical geometry -- direction accuracy 0.677+-0.029 versus 0.547 for a randomly initialized encoder, and position RSA 0.192+-0.047 versus 0.029 for random encoders (6.6x improvement), showing that training induces genuine structural organization beyond CNN inductive bias. Across 20 temporal checkpoints, prediction performance and semantic alignment co-improve (Spearman r=-0.61, p=0.004), consistent with the shared-driver account. We confirm this through a double knockout: standard KL regularization (beta=0.1) forces the encoder away from geometric structure, and both prediction performance and semantic alignment collapse simultaneously to near-chance by step 50,000 -- exactly as the shared-driver account predicts. Reducing beta to 0.001 restores geometric access and recovers both capabilities together. These findings establish physical world geometry as the organizing principle of world model representations, with direct implications for the design of semantically grounded embodied agents.

</details>


### [480] [Continuity and Ordinality Matter: Constraining Time Series Tokens for Effective Time Series Analysis with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28866)
*Musheng Li,Ziying Zhang,Cheng jin,Yuantao Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出COM方法，通过在初始化和训练阶段引入几何约束，以保持时间序列标记的连续性和顺序性，从而提升基于标记的时间序列大语言模型（TS-LLMs）性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于标记的时间序列大语言模型忽略了时间序列标记固有的连续性和顺序性，限制了模型性能。

Method: 提出COM策略，在标记嵌入的初始化和训练阶段引入几何约束，以显式建模连续性和顺序性。

Result: 在多个时间序列分析基准上验证了COM的有效性，显著提升了模型性能，具备良好泛化能力。

Conclusion: 保持时间序列标记嵌入的连续性和顺序性对提升TS-LLMs性能至关重要，COM提供了一种有效实现方式。

Abstract: Token-based time series large language models (TS-LLMs) have emerged as a promising direction for time series analysis and reasoning. However, prior studies largely overlook the inherent continuity and ordinality of time series tokens, which substantially limits model performance. In this paper, we argue that preserving these properties in time series token embeddings is crucial for the effectiveness of token-based TS-LLMs. To this end, we propose COM (Continuity and Ordinality Matter), a continuity- and ordinality-aware strategy that integrates geometric constraints into both the initialization and training stages. Empirical results on multiple time series analysis benchmarks demonstrate that COM consistently improves the performance of token-based TS-LLMs, achieving competitive results and strong generalizability. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/COM .

</details>


### [481] [PrismFlow: Residual Dynamics for Flow Matching in Time-Series Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28867)
*Junru Zhang,Lang Feng,Jinbo Wang,Xu Guo,Yucheng Wang,Han Yu,Min Wu,Yabo Dong,Duanqing Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PrismFlow是一种基于流匹配（FM）的新型时间序列生成方法，通过Koopman启发的动态专家系统和置信度感知的胜者通吃（WTA）目标，解决标准FM在多模态、多尺度时序数据中因全局向量场估计导致的频谱失真与模式覆盖不足问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准流匹配使用单一全局向量场估计器，在处理具有多模态和多尺度动态（如振荡与高频变化）的真实时间序列时，因ℓ₂速度匹配目标导致局部流场过度平滑，削弱分支特异性动态，引发谱收缩与模式覆盖差。

Method: 提出PrismFlow：1）引入多个Koopman风格的动态专家，各在隐空间学习非线性演化对应的残差线性修正；2）设计置信度感知的Winner-Take-All训练目标，仅更新最匹配样本的专家并屏蔽其余梯度，促进模态特化；3）采样时由选定专家叠加残差修正至全局流场，兼顾稳定性与细粒度结构恢复。

Result: 在多个基准上显著缓解标准FM的谱收缩问题，Context-FID提升15.6%，判别分数提升38.6%；同时在低数据场景下鲁棒，并支持高质量预测与插补。

Conclusion: PrismFlow通过解耦与专业化建模异构时间动态，提升了流匹配在复杂时序生成任务中的保真度与泛化能力，为时序生成提供了更精细、更稳定的新范式。

Abstract: Generating high-quality time-series data is challenging because real-world signals often exhibit multimodal patterns and multiscale dynamics, including oscillations and high-frequency variations. Flow Matching (FM) offers an efficient alternative to diffusion models, but practical implementations typically rely on a single finite-capacity global vector-field estimator. In such heterogeneous temporal distributions, distinct regimes may pass through nearby flow states while requiring incompatible conditional velocities. A monolithic estimator trained with the standard $\ell_2$ velocity-matching objective may therefore learn an overly smoothed approximation of the local transport field. This estimator-level smoothing can attenuate branch-specific dynamics, leading to spectral distortion and poor mode coverage. To address this, we propose PrismFlow, a new FM method with Koopman-inspired dynamical experts. Each expert learns residual corrections in a latent space where local nonlinear temporal evolution can be approximated by linear transitions. We further propose a confidence-aware Winner-Take-All (WTA) objective that updates only the expert best aligned with each sample while masking gradients to the others, encouraging mode-specific specialization. During sampling, the selected expert adds a residual dynamical correction to the global transport field, preserving FM stability while recovering fine-grained and high-frequency temporal structures. Across various benchmarks, PrismFlow effectively mitigates the spectral contraction in standard FM and achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a 15.6% gain in Context-FID and a 38.6% improvement in Discriminative Score, while remaining robust in low-data settings and effective for forecasting and imputation.

</details>


### [482] [TaxDistill: Improving Metagenomic Taxonomic Annotation via Distilled Genomic Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28868)
*Rongye Ye,Lun Li,Zheng Luo,Yiran Zhan,Shuhui Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TaxDistill，一种基于知识蒸馏的宏基因组分类框架，利用GenomeOcean大模型作为教师网络生成软标签，以减少传统相似性搜索工具引入的标签噪声，显著提升分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于序列相似性的宏基因组分类方法受限于微生物高多样性和参考数据库不完整性；现有学习方法（如Taxometer）依赖有噪声的相似性搜索标签，影响表征学习和分类效果。

Method: 提出TaxDistill知识蒸馏框架，构建5亿参数的GenomeOcean基因组基础模型作为教师网络提取深层语义特征并生成软标签，蒸馏至轻量级学生网络以抑制标签噪声。

Result: 在7个CAMI2数据集上全面超越现有基线；在胃肠道数据集上将MMseqs2的F1分数从0.763提升至0.941，优于Taxometer。

Conclusion: TaxDistill为复杂宏基因组分析提供了一种可靠的标签校正方法，有效缓解了由初始检索工具引入的标签噪声问题。

Abstract: Metagenomic taxonomic annotation aims to identify the microbial origins of DNA fragments in environmental samples. Traditional methods that rely on sequence similarity are often constrained by the high microbial diversity and the incompleteness of reference databases, which has motivated the development of learning approaches such as Taxometer that perform post hoc correction to learn more informative metagenomic sequence representations. However, these methods typically rely on labels derived from similarity search tools during training, which inevitably introduces noise that can impair representation learning and degrade classification performance. To address this issue, we propose TaxDistill, a knowledge distillation framework for metagenomic classification. We introduce GenomeOcean, a 500M parameter genomic foundation model, as the teacher network to extract deep semantic features and generate soft labels based on confidence. By distilling this soft label information into a lightweight student network, TaxDistill effectively reduces the label noise introduced by initial retrieval tools. Comprehensive experiments on seven diverse CAMI2 datasets demonstrate that TaxDistill outperforms existing baselines in most scenarios. For instance, on the Gastrointestinal dataset, it improves the F1 score of MMseqs2 from 0.763 to 0.941, outperforming the Taxometer baseline. Overall, TaxDistill provides a reliable method for label correction in complex metagenomic analysis.

</details>


### [483] [Balancing Multimodal Learning through Label Space Reshaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28869)
*Xiaoyu Ma,Weijie Zhang,Yuanhao Gao,Han Miao,Yongjian Deng,Hao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Balanced Multimodal Label Reshaping (BMLR)，通过重塑跨模态标签空间以均衡各模态到标签空间的映射难度，从而缓解多模态学习中的模态不平衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅补偿优化速率差异，忽视了模态间映射难度差异这一根本原因。

Method: 提出BMLR方法，从标签侧设计出发，重塑跨模态标签空间，使各模态到共享标签空间的映射难度趋于一致，并增强模态交互与类间信息融合。

Result: 在多种模型架构上实验表明，BMLR持续提升多模态性能，并具有良好的模型兼容性。

Conclusion: 模态不平衡源于模态到标签空间映射难度的差异；BMLR通过标签空间重塑实现更本质的平衡，为多模态学习提供了新视角。

Abstract: Multimodal learning often suffers from modality imbalance, where modalities that converge faster dominate optimization while others remain undertrained. Existing approaches typically mitigate this issue by strengthening the weak modality or adjusting optimization gradients. However, such strategies mainly compensate for optimization rate discrepancies, often at the expense of the strong modality's optimization capacity, without analyzing how these discrepancies arise at the modality level. Based on theoretical insights and empirical observations, we argue that the discrepancy of learning pace arises from differences in the mapping difficulty between modality-specific feature space and the shared label space. To address this issue, we propose Balanced Multimodal Label Reshaping (BMLR), the first method that promotes multimodal balance from the label-side design. BMLR reshapes the cross-modal label space to equalize mapping difficulty across modalities, thereby facilitating modality interaction and injecting richer inter-class information into each modality. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures demonstrate that BMLR consistently improves multimodal performance and exhibits strong compatibility with diverse model designs. The source code will be released soon.

</details>


### [484] [Representation Alignment Rests on Linear Structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28870)
*Kiril Bangachev,Guy Bresler,Yury Polyanskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出并验证了柏拉图表征假说（PRH），通过信号、偏差和噪声三方面构建统计框架：信号层面支持线性表征假说（LRH）并用稀疏自编码器验证其提升跨模态对齐；偏差层面发现中心化与归一化可缓解不同模型架构/训练带来的偏差；噪声层面揭示词频与表征对齐度呈正相关，表明数据稀缺是噪声主因；最终整合三者改进LRH，解释多类AI模型的表征对齐现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解不同AI模型间表征对齐（cross-model alignment）的根本原因，尤其是为何看似独立训练的模型能产生高度一致的语义表征（即柏拉图表征假说PRH），亟需一个可分解、可检验的统计解释框架。

Method: 构建信号-偏差-噪声三元统计框架；1）信号：基于线性表征假说（LRH），用稀疏自编码器提取线性对象-属性特征，评估其跨模态对齐强度；2）偏差：系统测试中心化、归一化等预处理对不同架构/训练模型间对齐的影响；3）噪声：分析大规模语言模型与文本嵌入模型中词频与对齐度的相关性，验证数据稀缺性对噪声的作用。

Result: 1）稀疏线性特征比稠密特征表现出更强的跨模态对齐，支持LRH对PRH的解释力；2）中心化与归一化显著且稳定地提升跨模型对齐，说明偏差可部分校正；3）词频与对齐度呈强正相关，证实数据稀缺是表征噪声的关键驱动因素；4）整合三要素后提出的改进型统计模型能更全面解释现代AI模型的对齐现象。

Conclusion: 柏拉图表征对齐并非偶然，而是由共享语义信号（线性对象-属性关系）、可校正的模型偏差（架构/训练差异）及数据驱动的噪声共同塑造；本文的三元框架不仅验证并深化了线性表征假说，也为理解与优化多模型协同、迁移学习和通用表征提供了理论基础与实用方法。

Abstract: We investigate the Platonic Representation Hypothesis (PRH) through a tripartite statistical framework of representations: signal, bias, and noise. {1) Signal:} We propose that Platonic alignment arises from the universal relationship between objects and attributes, which is encoded linearly in representations according to the Linear Representation Hypothesis (LRH). We provide evidence that LRH helps explain PRH by extracting linear object-attribute features with sparse autoencoders and showing that these sparse representations often exhibit stronger cross-modal alignment than their dense counterparts. {2) Bias:} Models have different implicit biases due to the diverse architectures and training procedures used. We show that this difference can be partially mitigated. Centering and normalization consistently improve cross-model alignment. {3) Noise:} Finite-sample training leads to noise in representations. We provide evidence that representational noise is driven by data scarcity by revealing a strong and consistent positive correlation between word frequency and alignment in LLMs and text embedding models. Synthesizing signal, bias, and noise, we propose a statistical model that refines the Linear Representation Hypothesis and explains further phenomena related to the alignment of representations emerging from diverse modern AI architectures.

</details>


### [485] [Pre-Registering the Detectable Effect: A Paired-MDE Budget for 4-bit Quantization Benchmarks, with a Pilot Audit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28873)
*Zexin Zhuang,Yanhang Li,Zhichao Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对量化基准可靠性的保守最小可检测效应（MDE）边界公式，将经典配对二元样本量计算适配到量化评估中，帮助设计者在运行前明确预算与可靠性权衡；实证表明，多数观测到的量化差异小于该MDE，且部分所谓‘基准不可靠性’实为二项抽样噪声；同时指出提示模板变异可能掩盖量化效应，强调预注册与控制混杂因素的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化模型（如NF4）性能评估常受小样本（如n=100）和混杂噪声（如prompt variation）影响，导致结果被误读为‘基准不可靠’；亟需一种可在审计前明确量化声明可靠性的规划工具。

Method: 将Miettinen（1968）的经典配对二元样本量公式适配至量化场景，推导出保守MDE边界δ* ≤ (z_{1−α/2}+z_{1−β})√(ρ_d/m)，其中m为配对项数、ρ_d为FP16与NF4的分歧率；结合四模型×四基准实验（k=5次分割，n=100）、MMLU prompt模板对照研究及预注册模板进行验证。

Result: 当假设ρ_d=0.10时，所有观测NF4-FP16差异均低于对应MDE；多数跨分割标准差落在二项理论范围±1.5pp内；唯一边缘案例（OPT-WinoGrande, |Δ|=3.2pp）在ρ_d=0.05时超出MDE，凸显规划权衡；MMLU中prompt模板波动（2–10pp）大于最大量化差异，说明未固定模板会抬高噪声基线。

Conclusion: 该MDE边界为量化审计提供可操作的前瞻性可靠性承诺机制；实证表明n=100子样本中的大部分方差源于二项抽样而非系统性不稳定性；要准确归因量化效应，必须先控制prompt等外部变异源，并推荐使用五行预注册模板规范审计流程。

Abstract: This is a planning-method note with an unpaired pilot audit. We adapt the classical paired-binary sample-size calculation (Miettinen, 1968) to quantization benchmarks, giving a conservative minimum detectable effect (MDE) bound $δ^{*} \le (z_{1-α/2}+z_{1-β})\sqrt{ρ_d/m}$ in the paired item count $m$ and the FP16-NF4 disagreement rate $ρ_d$. The bound turns "how reliable is my quantization claim?" into a one-line budget a benchmark designer can commit to before running. We illustrate the bound on four models and four benchmarks ($k=5$ splits of $n=100$), and add a parallel MMLU prompt-template study to put the bound's quantization-noise scale alongside the prompt-noise scale. Assuming $ρ_d=0.10$ (an unmeasured planning value), all observed NF4-FP16 deltas fall below the implied MDE, and most cross-split SDs lie within $\pm 1.5$ pp of the binomial reference $\sqrt{p(1-p)/n}$, so much of the variance reported as "benchmark unreliability" on $n=100$ subsamples is binomial sampling noise. The single borderline cell (OPT-WinoGrande, $|Δ|=3.2$ pp) is below the implied MDE at $ρ_d=0.10$ but above it at $ρ_d=0.05$, illustrating the planning trade-off the bound makes explicit. On MMLU, prompt-template ranges of 2-10 pp meet or exceed the largest observed quantization delta (3.2 pp), so a quantization audit that does not first fix the prompt template absorbs template variance into its noise floor. We complement the bound with a five-line pre-registration template.

</details>


### [486] [Towards Continuous-time Causal Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28880)
*Dennis Thumm,Ruben Wiedemann,Ying Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在连续时间下保持轨迹律不随观测时间表变化的因果时间序列建模方法，构建了满足该连续性准则的随机DAG模型，并通过实验验证其优于朴素离散积分方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将离散时间因果Prior-data Fitted Networks扩展到连续时间时，若SDE仅按观测间隔积分一次，会导致轨迹分布依赖于观测时刻，使先验退化为‘披着SDE外衣’的离散马尔可夫模型；需建立真正与观测调度无关的连续时间因果机制。

Method: 提出轨迹律对观测调度不变性作为精确连续性准则；建立三类模型分类（纯离散、朴素网格积分、细粒度积分+解耦观测）；构造基于随机DAG的顶层模型，支持OU或小MLP非线性漂移项、不规则观测及硬/软/时变干预；采用2×2编码器×积分器消融实验评估。

Result: 细粒度积分在8/8实验单元中显著优于朴素积分（符号一致性p < 1/256），且优势随评估网格细化而增强；编码器作用在细粒度积分下消失，在朴素积分下则呈现时间感知主导；开源了先验模型与初步零样本协议。

Conclusion: 满足轨迹律不变性的细粒度积分是实现真正连续时间因果建模的关键路径，所提框架在药代动力学与物理系统数据上展现出零样本泛化潜力。

Abstract: Extending discrete-time causal Prior-data Fitted Networks for time series to continuous time invites writing the mechanism as a stochastic differential equation (SDE) -- but if the SDE is integrated \emph{once per observation gap}, the trajectory law depends on when it is observed, and the prior remains a discrete-time Markov model in SDE clothing.
