  We propose a precise continuity criterion -- trajectory-law invariance to the observation schedule -- together with a three-tier taxonomy (discrete; naive observation-grid integration; fine-grid integration with decoupled observation) and a construction realising the top tier on a random DAG with OU or small-MLP nonlinear drifts, irregular observation schedules, and hard / soft / time-varying interventions.
  A $2 \times 2$ encoder $\times$ integrator ablation, run independently on a linear and a nonlinear prior, finds fine-grid integration beats naive on 8/8 cells (sign-consistency $p < 1/256$) with the gap growing as the eval grid refines; the encoder axis is null with fine integration but time-aware-leading with naive.
  We release the prior and a preliminary zero-shot protocol on pharmacokinetic and physical-system data.

</details>


### [487] [When LLM Reward Design Fails: Diagnostic-Driven Refinement for Sparse Structured RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28918)
*Youting Wang,Yuan Tang,Bowen Liu,Xuan Liu,Dingyan Shang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将大语言模型（LLM）生成的奖励塑形视为一种调试过程，而非一次性生成；通过诊断驱动的迭代优化方法，在MiniGrid等稀疏结构化强化学习任务中显著提升策略性能，并系统分析了失败模式、机制贡献与适用边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM直接生成奖励函数在稀疏、结构化RL任务中常因‘奖励泛滥’或语义/API误解而失败，亟需更鲁棒、可解释的生成范式。

Method: 提出诊断驱动的迭代奖励函数精炼方法：基于训练诊断（如返回趋势、成功率）和预定义失败模式分类（奖励泛滥、语义误解、弱塑形），引导LLM对奖励函数进行多轮针对性修订；辅以控制实验（如仅重提示、静态词汇控制）、消融测试及作者标注审计。

Result: 在MiniGrid的DoorKey-8x8和KeyCorridor任务中，成功率分别从2.3%→97.6%、31.2%→86.7%；静态词汇控制即达87.6%/70.7%，表明分类提示是核心机制；MuJoCo连续控制中效果受限，揭示方法边界。

Conclusion: LLM奖励塑形本质是调试过程，其有效性依赖于稀疏结构化任务、可靠语义接口与PPO训练框架；诊断反馈与分类提示是关键，动态标签增益有限；该范式不适用于密集奖励或接口不可靠场景。

Abstract: For sparse, structured reinforcement-learning tasks with semantic reward-function interfaces, LLM-generated reward shaping is better framed as debugging than one-shot generation. We study PPO-trained agents using MiniGrid as core evaluation and MuJoCo as boundary stress test. Our audit finds two dominant one-shot failure modes -- reward flooding and semantic/API misunderstanding -- plus a rarer weak-shaping case. We propose diagnostic-driven iterative refinement, where training diagnostics and a failure-mode taxonomy guide targeted reward-function revision. Refinement improves DoorKey-8x8 from 2.3% to 97.6% and KeyCorridor from 31.2% to 86.7% with high seed-to-seed variance. Controls show these gains are not from retrying or extra training: metrics-only re-prompting yields large drops, while a static-vocabulary control recovers much of the gap (87.6%; 70.7%), showing the taxonomy prompt is a major mechanism and dynamic labels provide only partially isolated incremental evidence. Budget-matched and Best-of-3 comparisons separate refinement from selection and training-time effects. Component-removal tests, sensitivity analyses, and an audit against author labels provide converging evidence for the debugging interpretation while revealing calibration limits. Continuous-control results show the boundary: success-based diagnostics can misfire in dense-reward locomotion, and return-trend feedback removes one false-positive mechanism without robust gains. The low-call protocol is a cost contrast with population-based reward search, not a benchmark comparison. In four crossed-variance-design environments, point estimates suggest larger gains when LLM reward-function variance dominates but bootstrap intervals are wide. The method is bounded to sparse structured tasks with reliable interfaces under PPO; fields like event_text may help, hurt, or be neutral.

</details>


### [488] [Context Distillation as Latent Memory Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28889)
*Ziyang Zheng,Zeju Li,Xiangyu Wen,Jianyuan Zhong,Junhua Huang,Lei Chen,Mingxuan Yuan,Qiang Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将上下文蒸馏建模为潜在记忆管理问题的新框架，通过LoRA适配器构建模块化记忆库，并结合检索、路由与自门控机制实现安全高效的记忆激活。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文蒸馏方法忽视了多个蒸馏出的潜在记忆在非理想（非oracle）场景下的存储、检索与安全激活问题。

Method: 将每个上下文蒸馏为独立的LoRA适配器，构成模块化记忆库；引入检索与路由机制选择最适配器；设计Self-Gating机制动态决定是否激活对应潜在记忆；并加入缓存共享以降低推理开销。

Result: 实验表明该方法显著优于带检索的基线方法，且Self-Gating机制提升了鲁棒性，能有效关闭不必要的潜在记忆。

Conclusion: 将上下文蒸馏视为潜在记忆管理问题，并通过模块化、可检索、自门控的设计，实现了更安全、高效和鲁棒的上下文压缩与利用。

Abstract: Context distillation compresses contextual information into model parameters, yet existing methods often ignore how multiple distilled latent memories should be stored, retrieved, and safely activated in non-oracle settings. We formulate context distillation as a latent memory management problem. We distill each context into an independent LoRA adapter, forming a modular memory bank that enables explicit memory selection. Given a query, our framework retrieves candidate memories, routes the query to the most suitable adapter, and uses a Self-Gating mechanism to decide whether latent memory should be activated. To improve efficiency, we further introduce cache sharing to reduce management overhead during inference. Experiments show that our method substantially outperforms baselines with retrieval, while Self-Gating improves robustness by deactivate unnecessary latent memories.

</details>


### [489] [Feature Geometry of LoRA Adapters: A Sparse Autoencoder Analysis of Representational Divergence in Fine-Tuned Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28896)
*Prasanth K K*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究LoRA微调对大语言模型内部表征的影响，通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）分析其几何特性，发现LoRA引入的表征结构与预训练SAE字典存在显著几何差异，表明LoRA更新占据残差流中部分独立的表征空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA已被广泛用于大语言模型适配，但其微调所引起的内部表征变化尚不明确，亟需从几何和可解释性角度深入理解。

Method: 提出delta激活框架以分离LoRA适配器对残差流的特有贡献；在Gemma-2-9B上针对不同LoRA秩（4/8/16/32）训练各层适配器专用SAE，并与预训练SAE字典对比；采用余弦相似度、主角度分析和中心核对齐（CKA）评估表征对齐程度。

Result: LoRA诱导的特征字典与预训练SAE特征在几何上对齐较弱；适配器专用SAE比预训练SAE更能有效重建delta激活；特征密度随秩和深度增加，但几何发散度在不同秩下相对稳定。

Conclusion: LoRA微调可产生预训练可解释性字典未能充分覆盖的新特征结构，这对机制可解释性、适配分析及安全审计具有重要启示。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has emerged as a widely adopted approach for adapting large language models, yet the internal representational changes induced by LoRA fine-tuning remain insufficiently understood. In this work, we investigate the geometry of LoRA-induced representations using Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs). We introduce a delta activation framework that isolates the adapter-specific contribution to the residual stream.
  Using Gemma-2-9B with LoRA ranks 4, 8, 16, and 32, we train adapter-specific SAEs across multiple transformer layers and compare their learned feature spaces with pretrained SAE dictionaries. We evaluate representational alignment using cosine similarity between decoder directions, principal-angle analysis of feature subspaces, and Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) between activation representations.
  Across layers and ranks, we consistently observe comparatively weak geometric alignment between LoRA-induced feature dictionaries and pretrained SAE features. Adapter-specific SAEs also reconstruct delta activations more effectively than pretrained SAEs, suggesting that LoRA updates occupy partially distinct representational structure within the residual stream. Additionally, feature density increases with rank and depth, while geometric divergence remains relatively stable across ranks.
  These findings provide empirical evidence that LoRA fine-tuning can induce feature structures that are not fully captured by pretrained interpretability dictionaries, with implications for mechanistic interpretability, adaptation analysis, and safety auditing of fine-tuned language models.

</details>


### [490] [PROTOCOL: Late Interaction Retrieval for Protein Homolog Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29158)
*Gabrielle Cohn,Rohan Gumaste,Minh Hoang,Vihan Lakshman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ProtoCol是一种新型蛋白质同源性搜索模型，通过将蛋白质表示为残基嵌入集合并采用ColBERT式晚期交互机制，在'暮光区'远程同源搜索中显著提升敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统比对方法在蛋白质序列相似性较弱的'暮光区'敏感性不足；现有基于蛋白语言模型（PLM）的嵌入检索方法常将上下文表示池化为单向量，丢失局部关键信息（如模体、结构域、保守残基）。

Method: ProtoCol将蛋白质表示为残基嵌入集合，独立编码、预计算候选表示，并采用MaxSim（最大相似度）在残基级别进行比对打分，借鉴ColBERT的晚期交互思想。

Result: 在SCOPe超家族和Pfam族基准测试中，ProtoCol优于基于序列组成、比对、池化PLM及训练单向量的各类基线方法。

Conclusion: 残基级晚期交互是一种有效的远程同源检索策略，ProtoCol验证了保留局部结构信息对提升暮光区同源检测性能的关键作用。

Abstract: Protein homology search underlies function annotation, structure prediction, and evolutionary analysis, but remains challenging in the "twilight zone," where global sequence similarity is weak and classical alignment methods lose sensitivity. Protein language models provide context-aware representations that could improve alignment sensitivity in this regime. However, prior protein embedding-based retrieval pipelines often pool these representations into a single vector, potentially obscuring local motifs, domains, or conserved residues that reveal remote homology. We introduce ProtoCol, a model which represents proteins as sets of residue embeddings and uses ColBERT-style late interaction to test whether residue-level comparison improves homolog retrieval. ProtoCol encodes proteins independently, keeps candidate representations pre-computable, and scores candidates with MaxSim over residue embeddings. On SCOPe superfamily and Pfam clan benchmarks, ProtoCol outperforms sequence-composition, alignment-based, pooled PLM, and trained single-vector baselines, supporting late interaction as an effective retrieval layer for remote homology search.

</details>


### [491] [Spectral Guidance for Flexible and Efficient Control of Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28900)
*Gabriel Moreira,Manuel Marques,João Paulo Costeira,Chenyan Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Spectral Guidance框架，利用扩散模型生成过程的内在几何结构进行控制，通过自监督学习奇异函数作为特征基，实现无需重训练或反向传播的稳定高保真条件生成，并在CIFAR-10上显著提升准确率与采样速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型中随着噪声增加，仅少数特征对控制有效，需一种能识别并利用这些关键特征的方法，以实现高效、稳定、无需微调的生成控制。

Method: 定义条件期望算子的奇异函数为关键控制特征，设计自监督目标学习该正交基；将各类引导信号（标签、CLIP嵌入、掩码）投影到该基上，直接作用于采样轨迹。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上条件准确率较最强无训练基线提升37个百分点，采样速度快4倍；同一特征基支持标签、CLIP及空间掩码引导；发现生成过程中存在指导效果最优的时间窗口（相变点）。

Conclusion: Spectral Guidance提供了一种几何驱动、通用且高效的扩散模型控制范式，无需模型修改或反向传播，统一支持语义与空间引导，并揭示了生成动力学中的关键结构特性。

Abstract: We introduce Spectral Guidance, a framework for controlling diffusion models by leveraging the intrinsic geometry of the generative process. As data is progressively corrupted by noise, only a small number of features remain informative for control. We characterize them as the singular functions of a conditional expectation operator and show that they can be learned via a self-supervised objective. Once recovered, this basis enables the projection of arbitrary guidance signals, such as labels, CLIP embeddings, or masks, directly onto the sampling trajectory. This approach allows for stable, high-fidelity control without retraining or denoiser backpropagation during sampling. Empirically, we improve conditional accuracy on CIFAR-10 by 37 percentage points over the strongest training-free baseline while offering $4\times$ faster sampling. Moreover, the same representations that support label and CLIP guidance also enable spatial control, such as mask-based guidance, without auxiliary models. Finally, our framework reveals a phase transition in the generative process, pinpointing the optimal time window for effective guidance.

</details>


### [492] [Sequential Physics-Constrained Neural Operator Forward Modeling for the $\textit{Norne}$ Reservoir System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28909)
*Clement Etienam,Juntao Yang,Oleg Ovcharenko,Nick Luiken,Tsubasa Onishi,Nefeli Moridis,Issam Said*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于神经算子（特别是傅里叶神经算子FNO及其物理信息变体PINO）的序列化代理建模框架，用于高效模拟三相黑油油藏动态，并在Norne基准模型上验证了其高精度与超高速性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统油藏数值模拟计算成本高昂，难以满足实时优化与不确定性量化需求；亟需兼具物理一致性、泛化能力与计算效率的代理模型。

Method: 构建基于产品Sobolev空间的函数分析框架；量化协变量偏移；分析PIN0的物理约束谱稳定性；开展K步截断BPTT梯度理论分析；在Norne油藏（113,344网格单元、30时间步）上训练并验证FNO/PINO代理模型。

Result: PINO代理模型在3298天全周期实现：油饱和度R²>0.99、气饱和度R²>0.90、压力R²≈0.80、水饱和度R²单调提升；单卡B200 GPU上1000成员集合模拟耗时<1分钟，相较OPM加速约10⁴倍。

Conclusion: 神经算子可为复杂多相流提供严格数学保障与卓越工程性能的代理模型，理论分析与实验高度一致，为数字孪生油藏奠定新基础。

Abstract: We develop a comprehensive mathematical and computational framework for sequential surrogate modeling of three-phase black-oil reservoir dynamics using neural operators, with particular emphasis on Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) and their physics-informed variant (PINO). The application focus is the Norne benchmark reservoir, defined on a heterogeneous $46\times112\times22$ grid ($N=113,344$ cells), with a production history spanning $T=30$ timesteps covering 3298 days. Our theoretical contributions are organized around four interlocking problems: (1) functional-analytic formulation in a product-Sobolev-space setting, including well-posedness of the implicit timestep map and sharp local Lipschitz estimates; (2) covariate shift quantification, proving that the Wasserstein-2 distance grows as $W_2 \leq \varepsilon(L^n-1)/(L-1)$, with exponential population-risk discrepancy for $L>1$; (3) physics-constrained spectral stability, showing PINO training with $λ_R \geq λ^*_R$ reduces the learned Jacobian spectral radius to $ρ_F + Cλ_R^{-1/2}$, yielding uniform-in-time rollout error $|δ_n| \leq \varepsilon/(1-ρ)$; and (4) $K$-step TBPTT gradient analysis, deriving geometric bias decay $O(ρ^K)$, optimal window $K^ = O(\log(T/σ^2))$, and Adam convergence $O(1/\sqrt{t}) + O(ρ^{K^*})$. Empirical validation confirms all theoretical predictions: autoregressive PINO surrogates sustain $R^2>0.99$ (oil), $R^2>0.90$ (gas), $R^2\approx 0.80$ (pressure), and monotonically improving $R^2$ (water) across the full 3298-day horizon, trained on eight NVIDIA B200 GPUs in under one hour. A 1000-member ensemble runs in under one minute on a single B200 GPU, giving a ${\sim}10^4\times$ wall-clock speedup over the OPM finite-volume simulator.

</details>


### [493] [Cycle-Space Informed Detection of Autoencoded Blind False Data Injection Attacks on Power Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28912)
*Xin Li,Chenhan Xiao,Jonathan Cohen,Aviad Elyashar,Yang Weng,Rami Puzis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于网络环空间（Cycle-Space）的拓扑感知检测器CSD，用于防御利用雅可比矩阵零空间实施的盲假数据注入攻击（FDIA），其通过最小环基（MCB）实现最优泛化误差，在无需精确线路参数下提升正常与攻击数据的可分性，并在多个IEEE标准系统上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于统计或数据驱动的虚假数据注入攻击（FDIA）检测方法易被利用相同数据结构构造的隐蔽扰动所规避，尤其在AI驱动数据中心和储能系统依赖实时测量与自动决策的背景下，亟需更鲁棒的检测机制。

Method: 提出拓扑信息驱动的环空间检测器（CSD），利用电网拓扑的环空间施加结构约束以增强零空间估计；理论证明采用最小环基（MCB）可实现攻击检测的最优泛化误差；不依赖精确线路参数，仅需拓扑结构。

Result: 在IEEE 14、30、57和118节点系统上的仿真表明，CSD能有效检测数据驱动型FDIA，且对实际测量噪声具有鲁棒性，显著优于传统残差型与时间序列异常检测器。

Conclusion: 基于拓扑环空间的检测范式可克服纯数据驱动方法的固有脆弱性，为电力系统提供更可靠、参数鲁棒的虚假数据注入攻击防御手段。

Abstract: The rapid growth of AI-driven data centers and large-scale energy storage systems is increasing the reliance of power system operation on real-time measurement data and automated decision-making. However, many existing detection methods rely on statistical or data-driven analysis of measurements and can fail when attackers exploit the same data structure to craft stealthy perturbations. To illustrate this limitation, we demonstrate a blind False Data Injection Attack (FDIA) in which an Autoencoder learns the measurement manifold and generates perturbations aligned with the Jacobian null space, thereby allowing the attack to evade both residual-based baddata detectors and time-series anomaly detectors. To mitigate data-driven FDIAs which exploit the null space, we propose a topology-informed Cycle-Space Detector (CSD) that leverages the Cycle-Space of the network to impose structural constraints that enhance null space estimation. In addition, we prove that by using the Minimum Cycle Basis (MCB), the proposed CSD achieves the optimal generalization error for attack detection. By exploiting topology-derived cycle constraints rather than relying solely on numerical null space estimation, the proposed method does not require precise line parameters and improves the separation between normal and attacked measurements. Simulation results on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems demonstrate that the proposed method effectively detects data-driven FDIAs under realistic measurement noise.

</details>


### [494] [CosmicFish-HRM: Adaptive Reasoning via Hierarchical Recurrent Mechanisms in Compact Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28919)
*Venkat Akhil Lakkapragada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CosmicFish-HRM，一种基于分层推理模块（HRM）的紧凑型语言模型，能根据输入复杂度动态调整推理深度，兼顾效率与推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型虽具强推理能力，但参数量大、推理成本高；本文探索在紧凑模型中实现自适应推理深度的新路径。

Method: 设计Hierarchical Reasoning Module（HRM），支持高低层级推理循环与基于复杂度的动态停止机制，并融合Grouped Query Attention、RoPE、SwiGLU等现代Transformer组件。

Result: 模型展现出非均匀推理行为，能依任务与输入自动分配不同推理步数；小规模时有开销，但随模型增大，HRM相对成本下降，收益提升。

Conclusion: 自适应推理深度可作为单纯扩大参数规模之外、提升推理能力的有效替代路径。

Abstract: Large language models have achieved strong reasoning capabilities, though often at the cost of massive parameter counts and expensive inference. In this work, we explore a different direction: adaptive reasoning depth in compact language models. We present CosmicFish-HRM, a compact language model built around a Hierarchical Reasoning Module (HRM) that dynamically allocates computational effort during inference. Instead of applying fixed computation to every input, the model iterates through high-level and low-level reasoning cycles and learns when to halt based on input complexity. CosmicFish-HRM combines this adaptive reasoning core with modern transformer components including Grouped Query Attention, RoPE, and SwiGLU activations. While the additional reasoning infrastructure introduces overhead at small scale, we hypothesize that this tradeoff becomes increasingly favorable as model size grows and the relative cost of the HRM core diminishes. Our results show that the model learns non-uniform reasoning behavior, allocating different numbers of reasoning steps across tasks and inputs. These findings suggest that adaptive reasoning depth may offer a promising alternative to relying solely on parameter scale for reasoning capability.

</details>


### [495] [LoopFM: Learning frOm HistOrical RePresentations of Foundation Model for Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29280)
*Shali Jiang,Hua Zheng,Boyang Liu,Laming Chen,Kenny Lov,Chuanqi Xu,Lisang Ding,Qinghai Zhou,Can Cui,Xiaolong Liu,Xiaoyi Liu,Yasmine Badr,Xin Xu,Jiyan Yang,Ellie Dingqiao Wen,Gerard Jonathan Mugisha Akkerhuis,Chenxiao Guan,Rong Jin,Ruichao Qiu,Xian Chen,Shifu Xu,Zhehui Zhou,Ping Chen,Rui Yang,Haicheng Chen,Xiangge Meng,Song Zhou,Dharak Kharod,Shuyu Xu,Qiang Jin,Qiao Yang,Wankun Zhu,Qin Huang,Yuzhen Huang,Darren Liu,Parish Aggarwal,Hui Zhou,Erzhuo Wang,Shuo Chang,Xiaorui Gan,Wenlin Chen,Santanu Kolay,Huayu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LoopFM 提出了一种通过结构化基础模型（FM）中间表征作为垂直模型（VM）输入特征的高带宽知识迁移框架，无需实时FM推理或架构耦合，在多个基准和工业系统上显著提升转化率和知识迁移比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识蒸馏（KD）仅传递单一标量预测，无法充分传达大模型丰富的中间知识，导致知识迁移率随FM增大而衰减。

Method: 提出LoopFM框架，将FM的历史中间嵌入（如用户历史序列）结构化为VM的输入特征，构建高带宽知识迁移通道；不依赖实时FM推理，也无需FM与VM架构耦合；并建立理论分析框架，包括增益分解与迁移率分析。

Result: 在三个公开基准上AUC显著提升（如TaobaoAd提升超6%），且与KD互补；在工业级系统（千亿参数FM、百亿样本）中，LoopFM在KD基础上将近知识迁移率翻倍，并带来Y1H1 +0.5%、Y1H2两次发布分别+1.03%和+1.22%的转化率提升。

Conclusion: LoopFM有效突破了传统KD的标量瓶颈，通过结构化中间表征实现高效、解耦、可扩展的知识迁移，已在大规模工业场景验证其有效性与实用性。

Abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers a single scalar prediction from a large foundation model (FM) to compact vertical models (VMs), suffering from diminishing transfer ratio -- the fraction of FM improvement captured by the VM -- as a single scalar cannot convey the rich intermediate knowledge that larger FMs learn. To address this bottleneck, we propose LoopFM (Learning frOm HistOrical ReP*resentations of FM), a framework that opens a high-bandwidth transfer channel by structuring FM intermediate embeddings as input features (e.g., user history sequence) for downstream VMs, without requiring real-time FM inference at serving and architectural coupling between FM and VM. We provide a theoretical framework for LoopFM with a gain decomposition and transfer-ratio analysis. On three public benchmarks, LoopFM demonstrates strong AUC improvements (e.g., 6\%+ on TaobaoAd) and complementary knowledge transfer capability with KD. On industrial-scale systems (billions of examples, trillion-parameter FMs), LoopFM approximately doubles the knowledge transfer ratio on top of KD, delivering a +0.5\% conversion improvement in Y1H1, and a +1.03\% and +1.22\% conversion improvement from two individual launches respectively in Y1H2.

</details>


### [496] [Conf-Gen: Conformal Uncertainty Quantification for Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28920)
*Gabriel Loaiza-Ganem,Kevin Zhang,Wei Cui,Marc T. Law,Kin Kwan Leung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了Conformal Generation (Conf-Gen)框架，将共形风险控制(CRC)扩展至生成式AI任务，为大语言模型、图像生成器和AI智能体等提供不确定性量化与形式化保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共形预测(CP)和共形风险控制(CRC)主要面向监督学习，难以直接应用于以无监督生成模型（如大语言模型、图像生成器）为代表的新兴AI技术，亟需适配生成任务的新理论框架。

Method: 提出Conf-Gen框架，在保持CRC核心思想的同时放宽其理论假设，统一并推广了此前在LLM上应用CP的方法，并将其拓展至图像生成、对话系统与AI智能体等新领域。

Result: 成功为图像生成器输出非记忆性图像、对话AI提出足够澄清问题、AI智能体输出正确结果等场景提供了共形保证，验证了Conf-Gen的灵活性与通用性。

Conclusion: Conf-Gen是首个系统性地将共形方法拓展至生成式AI的通用框架， bridging the gap between classical uncertainty quantification and modern generative AI.

Abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) and its extension, conformal risk control (CRC), are established frameworks for quantifying uncertainty in supervised machine learning through formal guarantees. However, recent breakthroughs in artificial intelligence (AI) have been driven by unsupervised generative models, such as large language models (LLMs) and image generators, which are not directly compatible with CP or CRC. In this work we introduce conformal generation (Conf-Gen), a general framework adapting CRC to generative tasks while relaxing its theoretical assumptions. Conf-Gen unifies and generalizes previous attempts to apply CP to LLMs, and extends conformal methodology to entirely new domains. We demonstrate the flexibility of Conf-Gen through some novel applications, including obtaining conformal guarantees on: image generators producing non-memorized images, conversational AI systems having asked enough clarifying questions, and the output of AI agents being correct.

</details>


### [497] [A Training-Time Diagnostic for Generalization via the Log-Alignment Ratio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28975)
*Ali Shehper,Ashish Vaswani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出并研究了对数对齐比（LAR），一种衡量参数-激活对齐程度的指标，通过重写为权重谱与激活谱之间的重叠来揭示模型在记忆与泛化间的转变，并在grokking和大语言模型预训练中验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解深度学习模型在训练过程中从记忆到泛化的转变机制，并寻找无需验证集、低开销的可解释性指标来刻画泛化能力。

Method: 将LAR重新表述为权重谱（归一化奇异值平方分布）与激活谱（输入在奇异方向上投影的归一化平方分布）之间的重叠度量，并在grokking任务和3B参数语言模型预训练中进行实证分析。

Result: LAR能有效追踪记忆-泛化相变；在grokking中预测有效函数维度，在语言模型中其偏离基线的程度与泛化差距相关，且下降速率预示过拟合；计算仅需前向传播信息，无额外开销。

Conclusion: LAR是一种高效、可解释、无需验证数据的对齐度量，为理解模型泛化行为提供了新视角和实用工具。

Abstract: We study the log-alignment ratio (LAR), a measure of parameter-activation alignment, introduced in parameterization theory. We reformulate it as the overlap between a weight spectrum $p$ of the normalized squared singular values of a matrix and an activation spectrum $q$ of the normalized squared projections of inputs onto its singular directions. We show that unembedding LAR tracks the transition between memorization and generalization in two different settings by capturing the spread of $p$ and $q$ during training. In grokking, LAR predicts the effective dimension of the learned function: $k \approx n^{2(1-\text{LAR})}$, where $n$ is the input dimension of the matrix. In 3B-parameter language model pre-training, its deviation from a non-overfitting baseline tracks the generalization gap, and its rate of decline increases as overfitting approaches. LAR is computable from quantities available during the forward pass with negligible computational overhead, and requires no held-out validation data.

</details>


### [498] [Comparing Post-Hoc Explainable AI Methods for Interpreting Black-Box EEG Models in Depression Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28977)
*Antonia Šarčević,Nikolina Frid*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究评估了多种后验可解释性方法（如DeepSHAP、Integrated Gradients、GradCAM等）在InceptionTime模型用于EEG抑郁症检测中的表现，发现不同方法在额叶、颞叶和枕叶区域（尤其右侧）存在部分一致的归因模式，但也揭示了方法间差异及其假设对结果的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型在EEG抑郁症分类中性能提升，但其决策过程难以解释，亟需可靠的可解释性分析以支持临床可信度。

Method: 在受试者分层5折交叉验证框架下，对InceptionTime模型应用五种后验可解释性方法（DeepSHAP、Integrated Gradients、GradCAM、Occlusion、Permutation Feature Importance），并进行跨EEG片段与受试者的全局归因聚合分析。

Result: 各方法显示出部分收敛的归因模式（集中于右半球额、颞、后部脑区）；梯度法与扰动法一致性高，DeepSHAP结果相对独特；方法间差异反映其内在假设影响显著。

Conclusion: 不同后验可解释方法捕捉到部分重叠但非完全一致的相关结构；结果虽与既往EEG-MDD研究趋势吻合，但属探索性发现，尚不能作为确定性神经生理生物标志物或直接临床依据；强调了后验可解释性在精神疾病EEG建模中的价值与局限。

Abstract: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled increasingly accurate electroencephalography (EEG)-based classification of Major Depressive Disorder (MDD), but the decision-making processes of high-capacity models remain difficult to interpret. This study investigates multiple post-hoc explainability methods applied to an InceptionTime architecture trained for EEG-based MDD detection. The analysis includes Shapley-based, gradient-based, and perturbation-based attribution approaches: DeepSHAP, Integrated Gradients, GradCAM, Occlusion, and Permutation Feature Importance. Explainability analysis was performed within a subject-level stratified 5-fold cross-validation framework using global attribution aggregation across EEG segments and subjects. The evaluated methods revealed partially convergent attribution patterns, with recurring emphasis on frontal, temporal, and posterior EEG regions, particularly in the right hemisphere. Quantitative comparison demonstrated substantial agreement between gradient- and perturbation-based approaches, while DeepSHAP produced comparatively distinct attribution distributions. At the same time, variability between explainability methods highlighted the influence of methodological assumptions on the resulting explanations. Overall, the results suggest that different post-hoc explainability approaches capture partially overlapping relevance structures in EEG-based deep learning models for depression detection. Although the observed attribution patterns are broadly consistent with several previous EEG studies of MDD, the analysis should be interpreted as exploratory rather than evidence of definitive neurophysiological biomarkers or clinical applicability. The study highlights both the usefulness and limitations of post-hoc explainability for interpreting black-box EEG classifiers in psychiatric applications.

</details>


### [499] [The Hamilton-Jacobi Theory of Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28983)
*Jose Marie Antonio Miñoza,Erika Fille T. Legara,Christopher P. Monterola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将神经网络训练精确建模为对Hamilton-Jacobi初值问题的搜索，揭示了深度学习架构（如ResNet、Transformer、RNN等）与粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程之间的结构对应关系，并统一了网络、热带代数、粘性PDE和凸优化四种视角；导出了最优泛化率、对抗鲁棒性控制、反向传播的最优控制解释、内在维度一致性及闭式归因函数等定量结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在建立深度学习与经典数学物理（特别是Hamilton-Jacobi方程）之间的严格、统一的理论联系，弥合神经网络经验成功与其数学基础之间的鸿沟，并为泛化性、鲁棒性、可解释性等关键问题提供原理性解释。

Method: 将神经网络前向传播建模为粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程的Hopf-Cole解算子，梯度下降对应于初始条件（权重）的优化；通过引入统一变形参数ε，构建网络架构、热带代数、PDE和凸优化四者间的Lipschitz连续交换图；分析不同架构（ResNet、Transformer、RNN等）对应的哈密顿量与粘性系数。

Result: 1) 得到固定时间t下的极小极大最优泛化率O(n^{-1/(d+2)})；2) 对抗鲁棒性由ε直接调控；3) 反向传播被证明是残差网络对应Hamilton系统的协态方程（满足Pontryagin最大值原理）；4) 缩放指数与数据内在维数一致；5) 获得O(N)复杂度的闭式影响函数（softmax归因权重π_j），其熵景观随ε增大发生折叠分岔，归因盆地合并。

Conclusion: 神经网络本质是离散化的Hamilton-Jacobi动力系统，其核心行为（训练、推理、鲁棒性、归因）均可由一个带粘性的PDE框架统一刻画；该框架不仅提供了深刻的几何与最优控制解释，还导出多个可验证的定量预测，为深度学习的理论基础提供了新范式。

Abstract: In this paper, training a neural network is identified, exactly, as a search through Hamilton--Jacobi initial-value problems: each gradient step selects the initial data of a viscous Hamilton--Jacobi equation whose Hopf--Cole propagator best fits the observations; at inference, the input is the spatial point at which that solution is evaluated and the initial condition is already encoded in the weights. The correspondence is exact for log-sum-exp layers and structural for broader architectures: residual networks, transformers, and recurrent architectures (RNNs, LSTMs, SSMs) each discretize the same class of Hamilton--Jacobi equations, with architecture-dependent Hamiltonian and viscosity. A single deformation parameter $\varepsilon$ unifies all four perspectives (network, tropical algebra, viscous PDE, convex optimization) in a commutative diagram closed under Lipschitz conditions. Quantitative consequences include: the minimax optimal generalization rate $O(n^{-1/(d+2)})$ for fixed $t$; adversarial robustness controlled by $\varepsilon$; backpropagation as the co-state equation of the Hamiltonian system for residual networks (Pontryagin Maximum Principle); scaling exponents consistent with data intrinsic dimension via PDE quadrature; and a closed-form $O(N)$ influence function (softmax attribution weights $π_j$) whose entropy landscape undergoes fold bifurcations as $\varepsilon$ increases, each merging attribution basins.

</details>


### [500] [SCOPE: A Lightweight-training LLM Framework for Air Traffic Control Readback Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29543)
*Qihan Deng,Minghua Zhang,Yang Yang,Zhenyu Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SCOPE框架，利用冻结的大语言模型结合插件式开放集分类器和上下文学习机制，实现高效、准确且可解释的空中交通管制语音指令复诵监控。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 飞行员对空管语音指令的复诵是防止误通信的关键保障，但约80%的航空事件仍与复诵异常相关；随着空域流量增长和机组认知负荷上升，亟需部署轻量、鲁棒、低延迟的自动化复诵监控系统。

Method: 提出SCOPE：在冻结大语言模型基础上，集成插件式开放集分类器与精心设计的上下文学习机制，实现轻量训练、开放集检测与错误修正，并支持决策解释。

Result: 在半合成通信数据集上，SCOPE在少样本设置下达到91.05%的开放集检测准确率和96.63%的异常复诵修正率，兼具低延迟与可解释性，显著优于现有基线。

Conclusion: SCOPE为可解释、可控、可部署的ATC复诵监控提供了实用新路径，推动大模型在高安全要求航空人机协同场景中的落地应用。

Abstract: Pilot readback of Air Traffic Control (ATC) voice instructions is a primary safeguard against miscommunication in air transportation. However, readback anomalies remain implicated in approximately 80% of aviation incidents. This vulnerability is further exacerbated by rising traffic volume and elevated cognitive workload, thereby motivating automated readback monitoring by machine. Traditional rule-based and machine learning approaches struggle to generalize across the highly variable and evolving phraseology of air traffic controller-pilot communications. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have opened a new avenue through their strong reasoning and generalization capabilities, existing approaches still face deployment and computational barriers in practice. In this work, we propose Semantic reasoning for Communication via Open-set Plug-in with Examples (SCOPE), a novel lightweight-training LLM framework that advances both the efficiency and accuracy of machine-based ATC readback monitoring. The core idea is to couple a plug-in open-set classifier with a carefully designed in-context learning mechanism on top of a frozen LLM. Extensive experiments on the semi-synthetic communication dataset show that SCOPE attains superior accuracy while delivering the low-latency response required for operational environments. Under a few-shot setting, SCOPE achieves 91.05% accuracy in open-set detection and corrects 96.63% of anomalous readbacks, thereby outperforming the strongest available baselines while providing explanations for its decisions. These findings demonstrate the potential of our framework as a practical pathway toward interpretable and controllable ATC readback monitoring.

</details>


### [501] [Learning Robust and Task-Invariant Functional Representation from fMRI through Siamese Self-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28990)
*Jiyao Wang,Peiyu Duan,Nicha C. Dvornek,Lawrence H. Staib,Denis Sukhodolsky,Pamela Ventola,James S. Duncan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BrainSimSiam，一种轻量级自监督fMRI表征学习框架，利用正样本对学习鲁棒特征，在小样本神经影像任务中表现优异，接近大规模模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: fMRI数据获取成本高、标签质量差、样本量小且维度高，易导致模型过拟合；现有大规模fMRI基础模型计算资源需求过高。

Method: 提出BrainSimSiam框架，采用仅需正样本对的轻量级自监督学习方法，学习泛化性强的fMRI表征。

Result: 所学表征在多个下游分类与回归任务中表现优异，超越全监督基线，接近大规模模型性能。

Conclusion: BrainSimSiam是一种高效、数据友好的fMRI表征学习方法，适用于数据受限的神经影像分析场景。

Abstract: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is a powerful tool for investigating human brain function. However, the high cost of data acquisition and the inherent subjectivity of psychiatric rating scales often lead to datasets with small sample sizes and variable label quality, especially when targeting a specific neurological condition. Combined with the inherently high dimensionality of fMRI data, these limitations substantially increase the risk of model overfitting. Recent years have seen growing interest in developing fMRI foundation models by combining multiple datasets; however, the computational resources needed for pretraining and fine-tuning are often prohibitive. We show that a lightweight self-supervised framework yields representations that generalize across diverse downstream tasks, outperforming fully supervised baselines and approaching the performance of large-scale models. We introduce BrainSimSiam, a data-efficient self-supervised representation learning framework that leverages positive-only data pairs to learn robust and generalizable features. We demonstrate that the learned representations achieve strong performance across multiple downstream classification and regression tasks, highlighting the potential of BrainSimSiam for data-limited neuroimaging applications.

</details>


### [502] [FormInv: A Measurement Protocol for Semantic Invariance in Mathematical Reasoning Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29001)
*Nishal Thomas,Noel Thomas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FormInv协议，通过跨模型一致性检测语义错误的数学定理重述（paraphrase），揭示现有基准测试中忽略的语义一致性问题（SCR），指出模型排名高度依赖于所选重述族，不存在‘免费’的无偏基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数学推理基准（如MathCheck）仅关注答案准确性，忽视语义等价重述下答案的一致性（Semantic Consistency），导致模型排名失真且隐藏严重语义错误。

Method: 提出跨模型 unanimity 自动检测语义错误重述；定义语义一致性率（SCR）和Cochran's Q作为核心不变性度量；构建覆盖366–811个Lean4验证定理的评测集；设计FormInvSelector支持场景感知的模型选择。

Result: 发现MathCheck中3.1%重述语义错误，导致GPT-4o排名下降；47%自动生成连词变体重述错误；9个前沿模型准确率仅差10个百分点（86–96%），但SCR差距达32点（50–82%）；验证No-Free-Benchmark推论：任意模型排名均可通过调整重述族权重实现。

Conclusion: 标准准确率基准无法反映模型真正的语义鲁棒性；必须将语义一致性（SCR）作为首要评估维度；基准设计者需明确其重述族选择所隐含的模型偏好，FormInv为此提供可复现、低成本、高召回的审计框架。

Abstract: A paraphrase-quality audit of MathCheck (ICLR 2025) detected 4 semantically incorrect paraphrases in 129 groups (3.1%); removing them drops GPT-4o from rank 2 to rank 4 and elevates Claude Haiku and DeepSeek V3 above it; these ranking changes are invisible to any single-model evaluation. Cross-model unanimity found these errors automatically (>= 3/4 models for MathCheck; >= 6/9 for our primary evaluation) for under $10; in our own dataset the same protocol found that 47% of auto-generated connective-variation paraphrases were semantically incorrect. That flaw compounds a deeper measurement gap: Claude Haiku 4.5 achieves 86% accuracy yet SCR=50%, meaning half its theorems are answered differently under semantically equivalent restatements, while aggregate accuracy across 9 models spans only 86-96% yet Semantic Consistency Rates (SCR) span 50-82% -- a 32-point gap invisible to standard benchmarks. Formally, for any target ranking over 9 frontier models there exists a weighting over paraphrase families that realizes it (No-Free-Benchmark corollary), because no model Pareto-dominates all families -- so benchmark designers who select families are implicitly choosing which model wins. FormInv supplies the audit protocol (replicated on external benchmarks at 100% recall), SCR and per-theorem Cochran's Q as primary invariance measures evaluated on 9 models across 366-811 items (on Lean4-verified theorems), and FormInvSelector for regime-aware model selection.

</details>


### [503] [FedQHD: Closed-Form Function-Space Federated Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29002)
*Yuchen Hou,Yongshan Chen,Zhuowen Zou,Calvin Yeung,Mohsen Imani,Tian Lan,Mahdi Imani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedQHD，一种基于超维（随机特征）状态编码器和线性读出的联邦Q学习方法，解决了联邦强化学习中参数平均在函数空间不一致的问题，实现了函数空间一致的聚合，并理论分析了异构编码器下的‘联邦差距’。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FedAvg-style参数平均在客户端使用异构或非线性编码器时，无法保证函数空间一致性，导致协同学习效果下降。

Method: 提出FedQHD：采用共享/异构的超维随机特征编码器+线性读出，使Q函数对参数线性；共享编码器下直接加权平均读出矩阵；异构编码器下，服务器在锚点集上平均Q值构建全局教师模型，客户端通过岭回归将其编译到本地表示；并形式化定义和分解‘联邦差距’。

Result: 在四个连续状态-离散动作控制基准上，FedQHD性能匹配或优于FedAvg及蒸馏方法，且计算开销显著更低；实验验证了联邦差距随编码器维度变化的趋势与理论分析一致。

Conclusion: FedQHD通过构造参数线性的Q函数结构，实现了函数空间一致的联邦学习；理论揭示了异构编码器下联邦差距的组成与可控条件（如锚点数≥客户端维度），为设计鲁棒联邦强化学习算法提供了新范式。

Abstract: Federated reinforcement learning enables decentralized agents to collaboratively improve policies or value estimates without exchanging raw trajectories. However, FedAvg-style parameter averaging is not function-space consistent: when clients use heterogeneous encoders or even identical nonlinear networks, averaged parameters need not correspond to the weighted average of client value functions in any common function space. We propose FedQHD, a federated Q-learning method using hyperdimensional (random-feature) state encoders with a linear readout, so that Q-functions are nonlinear in state yet linear in trainable parameters. This linear structure enables closed-form aggregation. With a shared encoder, the function-space consensus update coincides exactly with weighted averaging of local readout matrices. With heterogeneous encoders, the server constructs a global teacher by averaging client Q-values on a shared anchor-state set, and each client compiles this teacher into its local representation via a single ridge projection. We formalize the federation gap -- the error incurred when compiling a federated teacher into a heterogeneous client representation -- relative to a client-specific oracle projection. We show that this gap decomposes into subspace misalignment, anchor-set conditioning, and regularization bias. We further identify the anchor-to-dimension ratio $m \geq D_i$ as the well-conditioned regime in which the gap reduces to a multiple of the encoder heterogeneity floor. On four continuous-state, discrete-action control benchmarks, FedQHD matches or outperforms FedAvg-style baselines and distillation-based alternatives while requiring substantially less computation, and the empirical dependence of the federation gap on encoder dimension matches our theoretical analysis.

</details>


### [504] [LoRe: Adaptive Interaction-Evaluation Routing with Per-Step Interaction Budgets for Iterative Graph Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29005)
*Jintao Li,Yong-Yi Wang,Zheng-An Wang,Heng Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LoRe，一种无需训练、可即插即用的推理时稀疏化方法，通过动态选择高冲突或高不确定性边来限制每步交互计算量，在保持解质量的同时大幅提升扩散模型求解组合优化问题的效率与可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型求解组合优化问题时反复评估密集边/因子交互，导致推理耗时长、内存占用高，难以扩展到大规模问题。

Method: LoRe是一种训练无关、推理时即插即用的包装器，采用动态路由机制，在每步迭代中仅评估固定比例的边（如高冲突或高不确定性边），而非静态稀疏化（如kNN图或固定掩码）。

Result: 在最大独立集（MIS）任务上，LoRe将可行推理规模提升3倍以上（突破基线OOM限制），实现约8倍加速和12倍峰值内存下降；在TSP任务（n=1000）上实现约15倍加速和44倍内存下降，且解质量保持竞争力。

Conclusion: LoRe显著提升了扩散神经求解器的可扩展性与效率，具备跨任务泛化性和对拓扑变化的零样本鲁棒性，为大规模组合优化问题提供了实用新路径。

Abstract: Diffusion-based neural solvers for combinatorial optimization repeatedly re-evaluate dense edge/factor interactions, making inference expensive in wall-clock time and often memory-bound at scale. Inspired by the computational methodologies of many-body physics, we introduce LoRe, a training-free, inference-time drop-in wrapper that enforces per-step interaction-evaluation budgeting: at each iteration, it evaluates only a fixed fraction of interactions by dynamically routing computation to high-conflict or high-uncertainty interactions, instead of using a fixed sparsification (e.g., static kNN graphs or static masks). Under fully inclusive end-to-end wall-clock accounting, LoRe substantially improves scalability on the Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem, extending feasible inference more than $3\times$ beyond the baseline's out-of-memory limit, delivering a $\sim 8\times$ speedup and a $\sim 12\times$ peak-memory reduction, with solution quality preserved in this regime. Demonstrating cross-task generality on the large-scale Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) and zero-shot robustness to topology shifts, LoRe achieves a $\sim 15\times$ speedup at $n=1000$ with a $44\times$ memory reduction and competitive tour quality.

</details>


### [505] [Causal Intelligence for Constraint-Aware Intervention Design to Induce State Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29008)
*Zixuan Song,Uwe Mueller,Dimitris V. Manatakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出COAST方法，通过因果推断和多目标优化，为实现用户定义的状态转换设计出约束干预策略，并在合成与真实生物数据上验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预测模型缺乏机制性洞察和决策支持框架，难以指导系统从一种状态向另一种状态进行有针对性的干预。

Method: COAST结合上下文特异性因果图学习、结构因果建模、机制级分布偏移归因，以及约束感知的多目标优化，以平衡转换效果、干预复杂度与目标态稳定性。

Result: 在合成基准和真实生物数据集上，COAST成功识别关键因果驱动因子及鲁棒的单/多靶点干预策略，并提供可解释的机制依据。

Conclusion: COAST是一种模块化、领域无关的因果智能方法，为in-silico干预设计提供了可解释、可验证的新范式。

Abstract: Driving a system from one state to another through targeted interventions is a fundamental challenge in science, yet most predictive models offer limited mechanistic insight and no principled framework for decision-making. Here we present COAST (Causally Optimal Actions for State Transitions), a causal-intelligence approach for the in-silico design of constrained interventions that induce user-defined state transitions. Given data characterizing source and target states, COAST learns context-specific causal graphs and structural causal models, attributes observed distributional shifts to mechanism-level causal drivers, and introduces a novel constraint-aware multi-objective optimization formulation that balances transition efficacy, intervention complexity, and target-state stability. The approach is modular and domain-agnostic, integrating feature selection, causal discovery, causal modeling, and intervention identification and evaluation through interchangeable components. Across synthetic benchmarks and real biological datasets, COAST recovers key causal drivers and identifies robust single- and multi-target intervention strategies that achieve desired state transitions, accompanied by transparent mechanistic rationales to guide experimental validation.

</details>


### [506] [Label-Free Reinforcement Learning via Cross-Model Entropy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29009)
*Matt Gorbett,Hossein Shirazi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需标签的强化学习奖励信号——跨模型熵（CME），利用独立验证模型对生成模型输出的平均对数似然作为连续、免训练且抗作弊的奖励，显著提升开放域指令遵循能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLHF方法受限于需人工标注或可验证真值奖励，成本高或泛化差；而自参考式无标签方法易放大模型自身错误。

Method: 提出Cross-Model Entropy（CME）：以独立验证模型对生成模型输出的平均log-likelihood作为奖励信号，并将其集成到GRPO算法中，不修改原有训练流程。

Result: 在AlpacaEval 2.0等开放指令数据集上，CME在Qwen、Llama、Gemma、OLMo四类模型及三种训练阶段下均显著优于基线，tie-adjusted胜率52.5%–71.4%。

Conclusion: CME是一种有效、通用、免训练的无标签奖励信号，成功将无标签RL扩展至开放域指令遵循任务，避免了自参考偏差与奖励作弊问题。

Abstract: Post-training large language models with reinforcement learning is bottlenecked by the reward signal. Existing approaches require either ground-truth verifiable rewards, restricting training to domains with automatic correctness checks (e.g., mathematics, code execution), or human preference labels, which are expensive to collect and prone to reward hacking. Recent label-free methods replace ground-truth verifiers with self-referential signals like majority voting or token entropy over a model's own outputs, but risk reinforcing a model's own errors. In this work we propose Cross-Model Entropy (CME), the mean log-likelihood of a generator's response under a separate verifier model, as a label-free reward signal for RL post-training. CME is continuous, training-free, and grounded in the principle that responses a verifier finds unsurprising are likely correct or high quality. Because the verifier is independent of the generator, the signal cannot be gamed through self-consistency. We integrate CME into GRPO with no other changes to the training loop, extending label-free RL to open-ended instruction following -- a regime where self-referential signals are inapplicable or poorly suited. On open-ended instruction following (UltraFeedback prompts, evaluated on AlpacaEval 2.0), CME rewards beat the untrained base in head-to-head LLM-as-Judge comparisons across four model families (Qwen, Llama, Gemma, OLMo) and three training regimes (pretrained, SFT, and instruction-tuned), with tie-adjusted win rates ranging from 52.5% to 71.4%. Code will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [507] [Designing Active Tether-Net Systems for Space Debris Capture with Graph-Learning-Aided Mixed-Combinatorial Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29021)
*Feng Liu,Achira Boonrath,Gishnu Madhu,Eleonora M. Botta,Souma Chowdhury*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的优化方法，用于解决主动系绳网系统设计中的混合组合非线性规划（MCNLP）问题，将原问题转化为更易求解的非线性规划（NLP），显著提升了收敛速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理主动系绳网系统设计中含连续、整数与类别变量的复杂、约束、非线性优化问题；传统二进制或整数编码在高度非线性和多峰的MCNLP中表现不佳。

Method: 利用图结构表征组合空间，构建图神经网络（GNN）作为组合推荐器：以候选设计的连续变量为输入，输出其组合节点得分；从而将MCNLP降维为标准NLP，并采用带梯度微调的粒子群优化（PSO）求解。

Result: 在网形态、机动单元质量/推进器选型及控制器瞄准点联合优化任务中，所提GNN推荐方法相比直接求解MCNLP，实现了更快收敛且达到相似最优解。

Conclusion: 图学习辅助优化是一种有效处理工程设计中MCNLP问题的新范式，尤其适用于具有图结构特性的组合决策问题，可推广至其他复杂系统协同设计场景。

Abstract: Active tether-net systems are a promising solution for capturing large non-cooperative targets, such as space debris, by deploying a flexible net manipulated by maneuverable units (MUs). However, concurrent systematic explorations of design and control choices of the tether-net system to understand its full potential remain limited, partly due to the complex, constrained, nonlinear optimization problem that it presents -- one that involves a mixture of continuous, integer and categorical variables, with the latter two arising from net connectivity and component choices, respectively. Classical binary encoding methods are often ineffective for solving highly nonlinear and multimodal Mixed Combinatorial Nonlinear Programmings (MCNLPs) in engineering design, while integer coding approaches can introduce spurious relations among combinations. Given the graph-structured characteristics of the combinatorial space, this paper adopts and extends a new graph-learning-aided optimization approach to solve this MCNLP problem. Here, a Graph Neural Network (GNN) is trained to score (as output) and thereof recommend candidate combinations represented as nodes in a graph, with the continuous variable vector portion of a candidate design given as input. As a result, the MCNLP optimization reduces to an NLP, which can be solved using standard solvers. While this reduction approach is agnostic to the choice of the NLP solver, here a state-of-the-art Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm with gradient-based fine-tuning is used as the solver. Demonstrated on the problem of concurrently designing the morphology of the net, choice of mass and thrusters in the MUs and aiming points used by the controller of the tether-net system, the GNN-based recommender is shown to provide significantly faster convergence to similar optimal solutions, compared to direct solution of the MCNLP problem.

</details>


### [508] [Return-to-Go Is More Than a Number: Q-Guided Alignment for Return-Conditioned Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29028)
*Yuxiao Yang,Weitong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Q-ALIGN DT框架，通过将条件序列模型（CSM）的输入RTG与输出策略的Q值对齐，提升策略可控性与性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CSM将RTG仅作为数值输入，未使其与策略实际性能对齐，导致可控性差。

Method: 提出Q-ALIGN DT：利用Q函数为CSM提供稠密指导，并结合RTG扰动技术联合微调CSM与Q函数，强制高RTG映射到高期望回报轨迹。

Result: 理论证明其可高效学习近优策略；实验表明在D4RL基准上显著优于基线，且在速度跟踪等泛化任务中表现优异。

Conclusion: Q-ALIGN DT实现了RTG与策略性能的显式对齐，提升了可控性、性能与跨任务泛化能力。

Abstract: Conditioned Sequence Models (CSMs) learn policies by treating return-to-go (RTG) as a control signal. However, existing CSMs often treat the RTGs as simple numerical inputs rather than aligning them with the performance of their policies. In this paper, we propose Q-ALIGN DT, a framework that enforces this alignment by ensuring the $Q$-value of the output policy is consistent with the input RTG. By leveraging a $Q$ function to provide dense guidance to CSMs and further fine-tuning it using an RTG-perturbation technique with the CSM, our method ensures that higher RTGs are consistently mapped to trajectories with higher expected returns. Theoretically, we show that Q-ALIGN DT can efficiently learn the desired policy and output a near-optimal one when the RTG is sufficiently high. Empirically, we demonstrate through extensive experiments that Q-ALIGN DT achieves superior controllability and performance across the D4RL benchmark. Remarkably, our model effectively learns a structured family of policies that maintains precise alignment and generalizes to tasks like velocity-tracking where prior methods fail.

</details>


### [509] [Theoretical Foundations and Effective Algorithms for Policy-Aware Simulator Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29032)
*Christoph Dann,Yishay Mansour,Mehryar Mohri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以战略鲁棒性而非预测准确性为目标的模型学习新范式，将模拟器学习建模为模型与对抗性策略之间的零和极小极大博弈，并通过理论分析和实验验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）方法通过最小化预测损失学习世界模型，但强优化器会利用模型微小误差，导致模拟器滥用和现实差距问题，即策略在仿真中成功却在真实环境中失败。

Method: 将模拟器学习建模为模型玩家与对抗性策略玩家之间的零和极小极大博弈；提出基于评论家的简化方法，并建立误差-MDP对偶性；据此设计一种可证明收敛的主动数据选择算法。

Result: 在连续控制任务实验中，该方法将战略关键区域的预测误差降低1.5–2.2倍，并使纯仿真训练的策略达到接近最优的真实世界性能。

Conclusion: 以战略鲁棒性为目标的学习目标优于传统预测准确性目标，所提出的博弈框架及对偶性分析为构建更可靠、可迁移的MBRL系统提供了理论基础与实用算法。

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) agents typically learn world models by minimizing predictive loss. However, powerful RL optimizers inevitably exploit minor model inaccuracies, leading to simulator exploitation and a reality gap where policies succeed in simulation but fail in the real world. We propose that the objective for learning simulators should be strategic robustness rather than predictive accuracy, and formulate this as a zero-sum minimax game between a model player and an adversarial policy player. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis: (1) an online learning guarantee showing the game is learnable with sublinear regret bounds; (2) a tractable critic-based simplification bounding the global policy-value gap by the local critic's loss; and (3) an Error-MDP duality, proving that finding the worst-case policy is formally dual to a standard RL problem where the reward is the one-step critic error. This duality yields a provably convergent active data selection algorithm. Experiments on continuous control tasks demonstrate that our approach reduces prediction error in strategically important regions by $1.5$-$2.2\times$ and enables policies trained purely in simulation to match near-optimal real-world performance.

</details>


### [510] [Moment Matching Q-Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29033)
*Yiyan,Liang,Sifei Liu,Weitong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Moment Matching Q-Learning (MoMa QL)，利用最大均值差异（MMD）匹配分布各阶矩，以提升基于分数和流的生成模型在强化学习中的采样效率与稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Score-based和flow-based生成模型虽表达能力强，但在强化学习中因迭代采样导致推理延迟高，计算开销大。

Method: 提出MoMa QL框架，引入MMD进行多阶矩匹配，对条件分数函数施加强正则化，保证分布级收敛和超参数鲁棒性。

Result: 在D4RL任务中，MoMa QL计算效率更高且性能相当甚至更优；在offline-to-online RL中，因加速动作采样并增强在线微调适应性，表现更优。

Conclusion: MoMa QL通过统计矩匹配有效缓解生成式策略在RL中的推理瓶颈，在效率、稳定性与迁移适应性上取得综合提升。

Abstract: Score-based and flow-based generative models exhibit remarkable expressive capacity in capturing complex distributions, and have been extensively deployed in tasks ranging from image generation to reinforcement learning. Nevertheless, these models suffer from prolonged inference latency, which imposes a significant computational bottleneck in RL with iterative sampling. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new framework named Moment Matching Q-Learning (MoMa QL), which utilizes a technique from statistical hypothesis testing known as maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) that intend to match all orders of statistics between the original and target distribution. By enforcing strong regularization on all moment statistics, this algorithm guarantees distribution-level convergence for conditional score function and remains stable under various hyperparameters. Empirically, we show that our method MoMa QL is more computationally efficient with a comparable if not competitive performance in various D4RL tasks. Remarkably, by accelerating the action sampling process for flow-based policies, MoMa QL demonstrates superior performance in offline-to-online RL tasks because of faster and stronger adaptability for online interactive finetuning.

</details>


### [511] [Parallel Adaptive Multi-Objective Evolutionary Learning of Discretized Bayesian Network Classifiers for Clinical Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29058)
*Damy M. F. Ha,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进的多目标进化算法Baymex，用于高效学习可解释、紧凑且临床可检验的贝叶斯网络分类器，通过并行化与抗过拟合机制提升可扩展性，并在真实临床数据集上验证了其预测性能与临床合理性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Baymex虽在BN学习中表现优越，但存在计算耗时高、仅在合成数据上验证两大局限，亟需提升其在真实临床场景下的实用性与可扩展性。

Method: 引入并行化策略和自适应抗过拟合优化机制；重构Baymex以多目标优化交叉熵损失与BIC复杂度项，训练BN分类器；在RADCURE、SUPPORT及一个院内数据集上与决策树、逻辑回归、朴素贝叶斯和随机森林对比评估。

Result: 在16核CPU上实现超54倍加速；在多个临床数据集上预测性能统计上不劣于或优于基线方法；生成紧凑、可临床解读的BN，并发现多个含已知临床因子的合理BN结构。

Conclusion: 改进后的Baymex显著提升了效率与泛化能力，成为面向临床决策支持的可解释AI建模的有效工具。

Abstract: Bayesian Networks (BNs) are of interest from an explainable AI viewpoint, offering transparent probabilistic models for decision support. Baymex is a recently introduced multi-objective evolutionary algorithm for learning discretized BNs, enabling experts to trade-off different objectives of interest, such as likelihood, model complexity, and prior beliefs. While Baymex has been shown to outperform state-of-the-art BN learning approaches, Baymex still 1) requires a lot of computation time and 2) has only been evaluated on synthetic data. To improve scalability, we introduce a parallelization strategy as well as a mechanism that enables adaptively steering optimization toward networks that overfit less. We furthermore reconfigure Baymex to train a BN classifier through multi-objective optimization of cross-entropy loss and the BIC complexity term so as to evaluate its performance on real-world clinical classification tasks. Besides observing speedups up to over 54 times on a 16-core CPU, comparisons against clinically familiar baselines (decision trees, logistic regression, naive Bayes, and random forests) on two open-source (RADCURE and SUPPORT) and one in-house dataset, show that Baymex obtains statistically similar or better predictive performance while producing compact, clinically inspectable BNs. Importantly, Baymex finds multiple plausible BN classifiers that contain predictors consistent with established clinical factors.

</details>


### [512] [Ensemble Score Filtering for Real-Data Energy Consumption Forecast Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29072)
*Ruoyu Hu,Dahai Yu,Feng Bao,Guang Wang,Guannan Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合预训练时空预测模型与基于分数的集成滤波器（EnSF）的数据同化方法，用于提升不完整、噪声或延迟的能源消耗数据的状态估计与预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际中能源消耗数据常存在缺失、噪声或延迟，导致传统预测模型可靠性下降，亟需结合数据同化方法进行动态修正。

Method: 采用预训练黑箱时空预测模型作为状态传播器，并引入无需重训练的 Ensemble Score Filter（EnSF），利用闭式分数表示与蒙特卡洛近似实现高效滤波。

Result: 实验表明，EnSF显著改善了长时域下的状态估计效果，且在非线性观测场景下优于传统集合卡尔曼滤波（EnKF）。

Conclusion: 基于分数扩散模型的EnSF是一种适用于高维、非线性、部分观测场景的有效数据同化方法，可提升能源消费预测系统的鲁棒性与准确性。

Abstract: Accurate estimation and forecasting of energy consumption are important for power-system operation, planning, and demand-side management. In practice, however, complete and timely measurements may not always be available, and the observed data can be partial, noisy, or delayed. This motivates the use of learned forecasting models for predicting the evolving consumption state, together with data assimilation methods for sequential forecast correction. In this work, we study a high-dimensional data assimilation problem for real energy-consumption data. \modeltext{The forward prediction is supplied by a pretrained black-box spatio-temporal forecasting model, which is treated as the state propagator in the filtering procedure.} We employ the Ensemble Score Filter (EnSF) to assimilate partial and noisy observations and to correct the forecast trajectory over time. The EnSF uses score-based diffusion models to approximate filtering distributions and avoids retraining neural-network score models during assimilation by using a closed-form score representation and Monte Carlo approximation. Numerical experiments demonstrate that open-loop propagation of the learned forecasting model can become unreliable over long horizons, while EnSF-based correction substantially improves state estimation. Comparisons with the Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) further show that EnSF provides stronger correction under the nonlinear observation setting considered in this work.

</details>


### [513] [Momentum Based Reward Design for Low Emission Traffic Signal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29693)
*Chinmay Mundane,Amith Manoharan,Arun Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于动量的奖励函数（MBRF），用于深度强化学习驱动的自适应交通信号控制，以提升车辆通行效率并降低排放，相比传统延迟或队列奖励更稳定且权衡更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统交通信号控制系统难以适应动态交通状况；现有基于延迟或队列的DRL奖励函数易导致短视或不稳定的策略。

Method: 提出基于动量的奖励函数（MBRF），鼓励车辆持续通行而非仅惩罚拥堵，并在SUMO仿真平台中结合等待时间、队列长度、吞吐量和CO2排放等指标进行评估。

Result: MBRF在吞吐量-排放权衡和学习稳定性上优于延迟/队列奖励及经典控制器（如Max Pressure、LQF）。

Conclusion: 基于动量的奖励设计能更有效地引导DRL学习兼顾效率与环保的稳健交通控制策略。

Abstract: Urban traffic congestion is a growing global issue contributing significantly to long commute times and environmental pollution. Traditional traffic signal control systems often fail to adapt to dynamic traffic conditions. Adaptive traffic signal control can improve urban traffic without changing road infrastructure. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has shown strong performance for this task, but existing delay and queue-based rewards often produce short-sighted or unstable policies. This paper proposes a Momentum-Based Reward Function (MBRF) that encourages vehicles to keep moving rather than penalizing congestion alone. The method is evaluated in SUMO (Simulation of Urban MObility) using standard traffic metrics such as waiting time, queue length, throughput, and CO2 emissions. Results show that the proposed reward produces better throughput-emission trade-offs and more stable learning behavior than delay or queue-based rewards, as well as classical controllers such as Max Pressure and LQF.

</details>


### [514] [Knowledge Offloading: Decomposing LLMs into Sparse Backbones and Memory Modules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29075)
*Karim Galliamov,Rochelle Choenni,Ivan Titov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出知识卸载（KOFF）框架，将预训练大语言模型分解为稀疏共享骨干网络与领域专用外部记忆模块，在保持性能的同时实现知识重组。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索能否将大语言模型中通用能力与领域知识分离，将专用知识移至外部可替换的记忆模块，以提升模型灵活性和效率。

Method: 基于冻结基础模型，联合学习结构化剪枝掩码与轻量恢复模块（LoRA适配器与学习型KV缓存），实现知识卸载。

Result: 在Llama和Qwen系列模型（3B–8B）上验证，约12%全局稀疏度下KOFF能基本维持原模型性能，而单纯剪枝则性能骤降；LoRA与学习型KV缓存互补，且神经元分析显示语言特异性神经元更易被卸载、通用神经元保留在骨干中。

Conclusion: 大语言模型的知识可在共享核心与外部可插拔记忆之间有效再分配，支持模块化、专业化模型架构设计。

Abstract: LLMs encode both general capabilities and domain-specific knowledge in a single set of parameters. We ask whether this capacity can be reorganized: keeping broadly useful computation in a shared backbone, while moving specialized knowledge into external memory modules. We propose \emph{knowledge offloading} (KOFF), a framework for decomposing a pretrained LLM into a sparse shared backbone and domain-specific memories. Starting from a frozen base model, we jointly learn a structured pruning mask and lightweight recovery modules, implemented as LoRA adapters and learned key-value caches. Across Llama and Qwen models from 3B to 8B, we find that non-trivial capacity can be moved out of the shared backbone without a large loss in model ability. At around 12\% global sparsity, KOFF preserves much of the unpruned model's performance, while pruning the same frozen model without memories degrades sharply. Ablations show that LoRA and learned KV memories are complementary, and specialization analyses suggest that the learned decomposition is meaningful: language-specific neurons are preferentially removed while language-general neurons largely remain in the backbone. These results suggest that knowledge can be reallocated between a shared core and swappable external memories.

</details>


### [515] [OISD: On-Policy Internal Self-Distillation of Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29089)
*Xinyu Liu,Darryl Cherian Jacob,Yang Zhou,Jindong Wang,Pan He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出OISD框架，通过在策略内部自蒸馏，将最终层的预测信号（logit和attention）传递至中间层，提升推理能力，无需外部监督，在多个数学推理任务上显著超越基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL后训练方法仅利用稀疏的结果级奖励优化最终策略，忽视了中间表征中蕴含的丰富预测信号。

Method: 提出on-policy内部自蒸馏（OISD）框架：在rollout与GRPO优化过程中，以最终层为脱离的内部教师，对选定中间层进行logit对齐（传递高阶推理行为）和attention对齐（对齐注意力模式），并采用带符号优势加权的Jensen-Shannon散度实现一致策略下的表征蒸馏。

Result: 在四个数学推理任务上，OISD结合GRPO显著且一致地超越强推理RL基线。

Conclusion: 利用模型自身最终层作为内部教师指导中间层，是一种有效且无需额外监督的推理能力增强范式。

Abstract: Recent reinforcement learning (RL) post-training approaches primarily optimize the final output policy using sparse outcome-level rewards, while largely overlooking predictive signals encoded in intermediate representations. In this paper, we introduce a new paradigm called on-policy internal self-distillation and propose the OISD framework, which improves reasoning by transferring on-policy predictive signals from the final layer to intermediate representations. During rollout and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) optimization, the final layer acts as both the policy and a detached internal teacher for selected intermediate layers, which are guided to align with it through two complementary mechanisms: logit alignment, which transfers high-level reasoning behaviors (how to think), and attention alignment, which enforces consistent attention patterns (where to look) from the final layer to the selected intermediate layer, both without requiring external privileged information. Our OISD, together with GRPO, employs signed advantage-weighted Jensen--Shannon alignment to distill informative intermediate representations while preserving policy consistency under a unified acting policy. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of OISD, with substantial and consistent improvements over strong reasoning RL baselines across four mathematical reasoning tasks. The code will be released at https://github.com/THE-MALT-LAB/OISD

</details>


### [516] [Model Merging by Output-Space Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29101)
*Bethan Evans,Benjamin Etheridge,Stephen Roberts,Jared Tanner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于凸二次规划的模型合并框架，以最小化输出校准误差为目标，统一了多种现有启发式方法，并提供了可预测下游性能的质量诊断指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型合并方法（如task arithmetic、model soups等）虽高效且经验有效，但依赖启发式设计，缺乏理论最优性保证。

Method: 将模型合并建模为残差更新空间上的凸二次规划问题，以校准输入和微调模型输出为监督信号；引入残差能量占比作为闭式诊断指标；扩展至多层时采用逐层顺序算法。

Result: 在单层设置下QP方法匹配或超越现有方法；通过残差能量诊断可仅用校准集预测合并质量；在语言与视觉基准上多层合并均取得一致提升。

Conclusion: 模型合并可被严格建模为有理论保障的优化问题，新框架不仅统一既有方法，还提供可解释诊断与实用多层扩展。

Abstract: Model merging combines fine-tuned checkpoints into a single multi-task model without retraining. Existing methods - such as task arithmetic, model soups, TIES, and DARE - are computationally efficient and empirically successful, but rely on heuristic design choices and lack formal optimality guarantees. We show that merging can be formulated as a convex quadratic programme over residual updates, yielding weights that minimise a squared-output calibration objective using calibration inputs and fine-tuned model outputs, and subsuming existing methods as special cases. Our framework yields a closed-form diagnostic - the fraction of residual energy captured by a chosen basis - that predicts downstream merge quality using only the calibration set. Empirically, the QP matches or outperforms existing methods in the single-layer setting, and we characterise when the optimal basis provides significant gains over the cheaper diagonal QP. We extend to multi-layer merging via a sequential layer-wise algorithm and demonstrate consistent gains across language and vision benchmarks.

</details>


### [517] [Bridging Chemists and AI: An Expert-Augmented Framework for Interpretable Route Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29108)
*Yujia Guo,Mikhail Kabeshov,Tat Hong Duong Le,Samuel Genheden,Marco V. Mijangos,Varvara Voinarvoska,Giulia Bergonzini,Ola Engkvist,Samuel Kaski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合机器学习与化学家专业知识的多步合成路线评估框架，通过DeepSets模型和专家标注提升评估的准确性与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的合成路线评估方法过于简化多目标设计问题，且依赖专利等代理数据集，缺乏普适性评估标准。

Method: 构建基于DeepSets的模型，利用参考路线与机器生成路线间的树编辑距离进行训练，并结合专家对路线的定量评分与定性分类（Good/Plausible/Bad）进行微调。

Result: 系统在类别预测上达到Spearman相关系数0.78、Pearson相关系数0.77；在分数排序预测中top-1准确率达60.2%，显著优于基线17.5%。

Conclusion: 该专家增强的数据驱动框架兼顾量化评估与可解释性，在合成路线选择中展现出更高可靠性与实用性。

Abstract: Selecting efficient multi-step synthetic routes is a central challenge in organic synthesis, particularly in medicinal and process chemistry, where route choice directly impacts feasibility, cost, and development efficiency. Data-driven assessment systems often oversimplify the multi-objective nature of synthesis design and rely on proxy datasets, such as patent routes, rather than universally grounded criteria. To address this, we introduce an expert-augmented, data-driven scoring framework that integrates machine learning with chemists' domain knowledge for both numerical and explainable route assessment. A DeepSets-based model is trained using tree edit distance between reference and machine-generated routes, and then fine-tuned with expert evaluations to produce both quantitative scores and interpretable qualitative categories: Good, Plausible, and Bad. The resulting system achieves a Spearman correlation coefficient of 0.78 and a Pearson correlation of 0.77 for category assessment prediction, and 60.2% top-1 ranking accuracy for score prediction, substantially outperforming the previous baseline of 17.5%.

</details>


### [518] [When and How Long? The Readout-Mediator Angle in Temporal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29126)
*Shreyas Fadnavis,Praitayini Kanakaraj,Felix Wyss*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了线性探针（probe）在解释语言模型内部表征时的严重缺陷：即使探针能高精度解码某表征（如日期），该方向也可能与模型实际计算完全正交；作者通过'读出-中介角'量化这种正交性，并发现模型真正依赖的是另一组因果子空间（由DAS发现），而探针方向与之无关，表明探针不适合作为实时安全监控工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究线性探针是否真实反映模型内部计算机制，尤其在日期推理任务中为何高精度解码却与模型行为无关。

Method: 在日历日期持续时间推理任务中，对比sin/cos线性探针与分布式对齐搜索（DAS）发现的因果子空间；测量二者夹角（读出-中介角），结合注意力头QK偏置分析、MLP功能解析及稀疏自编码器分解验证表征分离；跨模型规模与任务泛化验证。

Result: sin/cos探针虽能完美恢复日序，但其方向被消融后模型性能不变；而DAS发现的4维子空间被消融则导致性能崩溃；二者夹角与随机子空间无异；探针与DAS特征语义互斥、因果重叠可忽略；该现象在1.5B–9B四规模及两模型族中复现，并初步扩展至空间位移与符号算术领域。

Conclusion: 线性探针常学习到与模型实际计算正交的方向，即‘读出-中介正交性’是探针可解释性的普遍失效模式，因此不能用于部署式安全监控。

Abstract: A linear probe can decode a representation almost perfectly and yet be completely irrelevant to how the model uses it. On calendar-date duration reasoning in language models, a $\sin$/$\cos$ probe recovers day-of-year from a layer's activations, yet ablating its direction has no effect on the model's answers -- while ablating a four-dimensional subspace found by Distributed Alignment Search (DAS) at the same layer collapses performance entirely. We measure the angle between these two subspaces -- the \emph{readout-mediator angle} -- and find it indistinguishable from the angle between two random subspaces (the Haar-uniform null), meaning the probe has learned a direction orthogonal to the model's actual computation. Reverse-engineering the circuit reveals why: attention heads route month-grained context through learned QK offsets at ${\pm}30$ and ${\pm}61$ days, and MLPs then convert \emph{when} (absolute date) into \emph{how long} (duration) -- all downstream of the causal subspace the probe never touches. Sparse-autoencoder decomposition confirms the split: probe-aligned and DAS-aligned features encode semantically disjoint concepts with negligible causal overlap. The dissociation replicates across four scales ($1.5$-$9\,$B) and two model families, with preliminary evidence on two further domains (spatial displacement, symbolic arithmetic), suggesting that readout-mediator orthogonality is a general failure mode of probe-based interpretability. This directly undermines proposals to deploy probes as runtime safety monitors: the probe can report high confidence on a direction the model has silently abandoned.

</details>


### [519] [Apertus LLM Family Expansion via Distillation and Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29128)
*Andrei Panferov,Davit Melikidze,Martin Jaggi,Dan Alistarh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文验证了蒸馏和量化作为扩展大语言模型家族至新尺寸和硬件格式的低成本方法，并基于Apertus 8B模型构建了参数量最多为4B的Apertus-v1.1蒸馏模型族。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型（LLMs）在各类应用中的广泛采用，需满足不同预算和硬件约束，因此需要发布多种尺寸的模型以覆盖更广的约束范围。

Method: 采用知识蒸馏与量化技术，基于开源的Apertus 8B LLM构建参数量最多为4B的Apertus-v1.1蒸馏模型族，训练数据为1.7万亿符合宽松许可协议的token。

Result: 所提方法在覆盖广泛硬件与系统需求方面展现出高成本效益和强准确性表现。

Conclusion: 蒸馏与量化是扩展LLM家族至新尺寸和硬件格式的一种高效且经济可行的技术路径。

Abstract: The wide adoption of LLMs has led to their use in great variety of applications and scenarios, such as chatbot assistants and data annotation, creating the need for the models to satisfy certain budget and hardware constraints. This has led to the trend of LLMs being released in batches consisting of similar models of various sizes for the family of models to adhere to as wide of a range of constraints as possible. In this paper, we validate distillation and quantization as a cost-effective way to expand model families to new sizes and hardware formats. Based on the open-recipe Apertus 8B LLM, we produce Apertus-v1.1 - a distilled family of models with up to 4B parameters trained on 1.7T permissive license tokens. We demonstrate cost-efficiency and strong accuracy performance of our approach for covering large ranges of hardware and systems requirements.

</details>


### [520] [Optimal Gap-Dependent Regret for Private Stochastic Decision-Theoretic Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29148)
*Tommaso Cesari,Roberto Colomboni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需预设时间范围的纯差分隐私（pure-DP）算法，解决了Hu和Mehta提出的COLT开放问题，实现了事件级纯差分隐私下随机决策在线学习的最优gap-dependent遗憾率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决COLT开放问题：确定事件级纯差分隐私下随机决策论在线学习的最优gap-dependent遗憾率。

Method: 设计一种horizon-free纯DP算法：将时间划分为指数增长长度的块，在每块内固定选择一个动作；通过指数机制作用于前一块的数据无关随机前缀来选择下一动作；利用softmax选择误差与熵势能分析控制隐私主导的大间隔动作。

Result: 证明了显式遗憾上界：Reg_T ≤ 1000·(log K / Δ_min + log K / ε)，对任意时间范围T成立，达到已知下界阶数，实现最优gap-dependent regret rate。

Conclusion: 该算法首次在事件级纯差分隐私设定下达到理论最优的gap-dependent遗憾率，填补了该COLT开放问题的空白，并为隐私在线学习提供了新分析工具（如随机前缀+熵势能）。

Abstract: We study stochastic decision-theoretic online learning with full information and event-level pure differential privacy. A COLT open problem of Hu and Mehta asks to determine the optimal gap-dependent regret rate for stochastic decision-theoretic online learning under pure event-level differential privacy. For $K$ actions, losses in $[0,1]$, and a unique best action separated from the second-best action by gap $Δ_{\min}$, the known lower bound is of order $
  \frac{\log K}{\min\{Δ_{\min},\varepsilon\}}, $
or equivalently, up to universal constants, of order \[
  \frac{\log K}{Δ_{\min}}+\frac{\log K}{\varepsilon}. \] We give a horizon-free pure-DP algorithm and prove the explicit regret bound \[
  \operatorname{Reg}_T
  \le
  1000 \cdot \left(\frac{\log K}{Δ_{\min}}+\frac{\log K}{\varepsilon}\right) \] for every horizon $T$. The numerical constant is not optimized. The algorithm partitions time into blocks of exponentially increasing size, plays a single action throughout each block, and chooses the next action by an exponential mechanism applied to a data-independent random prefix of the previous block. The random prefix converts block regret into a sum, over all prefix lengths, of softmax selection errors. A single entropy-potential argument controls all privacy-dominated large-gap actions at cost $\log K/\varepsilon$.

</details>


### [521] [Do Deep Networks Forget Initialization? A Forgetting-Time View of Practical Inductive Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29152)
*Mohua Das,Pierfrancesco Beneventano,Shibshankar Dey,Gareth H. McKinkey,Tomaso Poggio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了随机初始化神经网络在训练后对初始参数的依赖程度，提出了'初始化记忆'的概念，并通过CIFAR-10上的ResNet实验发现：低学习率SGD能保留较强的初始化记忆，而Adam类优化器和高学习率+L2正则则显著削弱该记忆；表明训练过程中的'遗忘动力学'会过滤架构先验，影响最终模型的归纳偏置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究随机初始化神经网络在训练完成后，其预测器在多大程度上仍依赖于初始参数（即初始偏差是否在训练中被保留），以理解实际训练所得模型的归纳偏置来源。

Method: 提出'初始化记忆'（initialization memory）作为可测量指标，定义为验证集选出的预测器对初始化尺度的依赖性；在CIFAR-10上对ResNet-9等模型进行受控实验，系统比较SGD（不同学习率、批量大小）与Adam类优化器、以及添加L2正则等条件下的测试准确率变化。

Result: 低学习率SGD下初始化记忆强（ResNet-9上测试准确率随初始化尺度变化达26.5个百分点，且延长训练至5000轮不变）；Adam类优化器和高学习率+L2正则显著削弱该记忆；遗忘行为与显式/隐式正则强度及时间尺度相关。

Conclusion: 训练后的模型归纳偏置并非仅由网络架构先验决定，而是经训练流程（尤其是‘遗忘动力学’）过滤后的结果；提升泛化的正则化手段，本质上是擦除初始化记忆的过程。

Abstract: Randomly initialized neural networks induce a prior over functions, but the predictor used in practice is produced only after training. We ask how much of this initial bias survives the training pipeline. To make the question measurable, we introduce initialization memory: the dependence of the validation-selected predictor on the scale of the random initialization. We perform controlled CIFAR-10 experiments on ResNets where initialization memory already sharply separates training regimes. Low-learning-rate SGD can interpolate while still remembering its initialization: on ResNet-9 with batch size $b=128$, test accuracy varies by $26.5$ percentage points across initialization scales despite $\ge99.5\%$ training accuracy. This is not undertraining: extending the same low-learning-rate regime to $5{,}000$ epochs leaves the spread essentially unchanged. In contrast, Adam-family methods largely erase the dependence. SGD can also be made to forget when larger learning rates are paired with explicit $L_2$ norm control. We interpret these findings in terms of the time scale of forgetting: gradient-flow-like dynamics can preserve initialization memory, whereas stochastic finite-step effects, explicit norm decay, and adaptive preconditioning erase it on scales governed by the size of explicit or implicit regularization. The practical inductive bias of a trained network is therefore not the architectural prior alone, but the architectural prior after being filtered by the forgetting dynamics of the training pipeline; and the same regularizers that improve generalization are precisely those that erase memory of initialization.

</details>


### [522] [Unveiling Multi-regime Patterns in SciML: Distinct Failure Modes and Regime-specific Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29153)
*Yuxin Wang,Yuanzhe Hu,Xiaokun Zhong,Xiaopeng Wang,Haiquan Lu,Tianyu Pang,Michael W. Mahoney,Yujun Yan,Pu Ren,Yaoqing Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向多训练机制的诊断框架，用于分析科学机器学习（SciML）模型中的多机制行为，发现其普遍存在三机制结构、优化效果具有机制特异性，并揭示了传统损失景观度量难以解释的细粒度失效模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络在不同超参数设置下可能落入不同的训练‘机制’，而现有研究缺乏对SciML模型中这种多机制行为的系统性诊断与理解。

Method: 提出一种机制感知的诊断框架，联合分析模型性能、训练动力学和损失景观几何结构，并在多种SciML模型（PINN、神经算子、Neural ODE）、约束形式与优化器设计上进行实证验证。

Result: 发现了跨模型/约束/优化器的一致三机制结构；证实优化有效性高度依赖机制；识别出挑战传统损失景观解释的细粒度失效模式。

Conclusion: 多机制视角有助于建立任务无关的SciML失效统一分析范式，并为提升模型鲁棒性提供机制感知的指导依据。

Abstract: Neural networks trained under different hyperparameter settings can fall into distinct training "regimes," with consistent behavior within regimes and qualitative differences across regimes. In this paper, we study such multi-regime behavior in scientific machine learning (SciML) models through a regime-aware diagnostic framework that jointly analyzes performance, training dynamics, and loss-landscape geometry. We identify three key findings: (i) a consistent three-regime structure emerges across many standard SciML models, different constraint enforcements, and various optimizer designs; (ii) optimization effectiveness is regime-specific, with no single method performing well across all regimes; and (iii) SciML models can exhibit fine-grained failure modes that can challenge conventional interpretations of standard loss-landscape metrics. Our results provide an approach to establish a unified, task-oblivious perspective on failure modes in SciML and to inform regime-aware guidance for improving robustness. We validate these findings across widely-used SciML models, including physics-informed neural networks, neural operators, and neural ordinary differential equations, on benchmarks spanning representative ordinary and partial differential equations.

</details>


### [523] [RUBRIC-ARROW: Alternating Pointwise Rubric Reward Modeling for LLM Post-training in Non-verifiable Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29156)
*Haoxiang Jiang,Zihan Dong,Tianci Liu,Wanying Wang,Ran Xu,Tony Yu,Linjun Zhang,Haoyu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RUBRIC-ARROW框架，通过交替训练rubric生成器与条件判断器，结合概率化评分与偏好奖励，缓解主观场景下点对点奖励建模的绝对评分难与平局问题，提升下游策略微调效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 点对点奖励建模在主观、不可验证任务中难以进行绝对评分；现有基于量表（rubric）的方法依赖强基座大模型且因布尔聚合易产生平局。

Method: 提出RUBRIC-ARROW交替训练框架：联合训练rubric生成器与rubric条件化judge；采用概率化评分规则降低平局；RL阶段仅用成对偏好数据，并设计阶段特异性偏好奖励与交替GRPO方案优化点对点评估器。

Result: 在多个基准上实现具竞争力的奖励建模准确率，并为下游策略后训练带来稳定性能增益。

Conclusion: RUBRIC-ARROW有效缓解了主观任务中奖励建模的绝对评分困难与平局问题，无需前沿大模型即可提升整体后训练效果。

Abstract: Pointwise reward modeling offers critical signals for LLM post-training, yet struggles with absolute scoring in subjective, non-verifiable settings. Rubric-based methods address this by decomposing evaluation into explicit criteria, but existing approaches typically depend on frontier LLMs and suffer from ties caused by hard Boolean aggregation. We present RUBRIC-ARROW, an alternating framework that jointly trains a rubric generator and a rubric-conditioned judge, with its RL stage using only pairwise preference data. Our method couples a probability-based scoring rule that reduces ties with phase-specific preference-based rewards and an alternating GRPO scheme that together train the pointwise evaluator. Extensive experiments show that RUBRIC-ARROW achieves competitive reward-modeling accuracy and yields consistent gains for downstream policy post-training.

</details>


### [524] [Parallax: Parameterized Local Linear Attention for Language Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29157)
*Yifei Zuo,Dhruv Pai,Zhichen Zeng,Alec Dewulf,Shuming Hu,Zhaoran Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Parallax，一种可扩展的参数化局部线性注意力机制，通过改进局部线性估计、消除数值求解器并引入查询式投影器，在保持计算高效的同时提升性能；在0.6B和1.7B模型上预训练验证了其一致性困惑度下降及下游任务泛化能力，并首次实证展示了注意力架构与优化器（Muon）的协同设计优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有注意力机制结构长期未变，局部线性注意力（LLA）虽具理论优势但受限于计算开销和数值不稳定性，难以应用于大语言模型预训练。

Method: 提出Parallax：参数化的局部线性注意力，去除LLA中的数值求解器，增加学习型查询式投影器以探测KV协方差；构建统一注意力机制家族（按带宽、探针构造与仿射结构划分）；设计硬件感知算法提升算术强度，实现更计算受限的注意力；集成Muon优化器进行协同优化。

Result: Parallax解码核在多种批大小与上下文长度下匹配或超越FlashAttention 2/3；0.6B与1.7B模型预训练中持续降低困惑度，且在参数量与计算量控制实验中均表现更优（Pareto改进）；发现Muon能显著释放Parallax潜力，首次实证架构-优化器协同设计的有效性。

Conclusion: Parallax是一种理论扎实、工程可行、性能优越的新型注意力机制，其成功依赖于架构与优化器的深度协同设计，为高效注意力研究开辟新路径。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become the central paradigm in artificial intelligence, yet the core computational primitive of attention has remained structurally unchanged. Local Linear Attention (LLA) is an attention mechanism derived from nonparametric statistics in the test-time regression framework. In contrast to prior research on efficient attention variants, LLA upgrades the local constant estimate in softmax attention to a local linear estimate, yielding provably superior bias-variance tradeoffs for associative memory.
